title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.

title: Full-Time Video Editor - Short-Form Ad Creatives
description:
We're a US-based agency scaling our paid advertising. We need a full-time video editor to create short-form video ads for
, Instagram, and TikTok.



What You'll Do:

 -Edit short-form video ads (30–60s) from raw footage and scripts we provide

 -Add AI voiceovers (ElevenLabs), subtitles, and background music

 -Produce multiple hook variations per ad

 -Study top-performing ads and match their style

 -Iterate quickly based on feedback



What We're Looking For:

 -Experience editing short-form video ads (Meta, TikTok, Reels)

 -Comfortable with fast-paced, direct-response ad style

 -Reliable, communicative, and consistent with deadlines

 -Available full-time



Compensation & Terms:

 -Starting rate: $4/hour, with increases based on speed and quality

 -40 hours/week or more

 -Flexible working hours

 -Weekly payment



How to Apply:

Send 2–3 samples of short-form video ads you've edited. If your work looks like a good fit, we'll send you a paid test task. The test is paid once we start working together.



We're excited to find someone who fits the team, looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Frontend Web Developer (HTML/CSS/JS)
description:
I run a UK-based web design agency building fast, high-performance brochure websites for small businesses.



I'm looking for a frontend developer to work directly with me on a per-project basis, with the goal of building a steady, long-term working relationship.



How We Work



All websites are hand-coded static sites using a structured component system.



This role is not suitable for developers who rely on:



WordPress

Elementor

Webflow

Wix

Any page builders



You must be comfortable building directly in code.



The Stack:



HTML, CSS (LESS), JavaScript

VS Code, Netlify

Eleventy (11ty) and Nunjucks – a plus (you must be willing to learn)

AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) used daily



What You'll Be Doing: 



Building complete websites using a provided starter kit and component system

Styling and adjusting layouts using LESS (fully responsive)

Writing clean, functional JavaScript (no frameworks)

Achieving high PageSpeed / Lighthouse scores



Using AI tools to:

Convert PNG ? SVG

Remove backgrounds

Optimise images

Debug issues

Applying basic design judgement (fonts, spacing, layout consistency)



Requirements:



Strong HTML & CSS (clean, structured code) – Essential

Solid JavaScript (no frameworks) – Essential

Strong written English – Essential

Strong responsive design skills

Comfortable using AI tools in real work



What Matters Most



This role is not about years of experience.



I’m looking for someone who can:



Take instructions and execute correctly

Work independently without constant guidance

Read documentation and figure things out

Deliver consistent, high-quality work



The Role



You will not deal with clients.

You will work only with me.



You will be given:



A client questionnaire

A design direction

A clear system



Your job is to produce a finished website independently.



Pay



6,400 – 12,150 per website (£80–£150)

Typical build time: 8–15 hours (faster once trained)



This is designed to become consistent, ongoing work, with potential for:



Regular monthly income

Pay increases over time

Long-term working relationship

Application Process



Shortlisted candidates will complete a small paid test task.



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of hand-coded HTML/CSS/JS websites

(builder sites will not be considered)

A short note on your experience

How you use AI tools in your workflow



Confirmation you are comfortable:



Working per project

Learning from documentation

Working independently



Important:

Write the word "SYSTEM" at the top of your application so I know you’ve read this properly.

description:

We’re looking for a full-time Video Editor who can take raw footage, ideas, and scripts and turn them into scroll-stopping, conversion-focused videos across paid channels.

Note: This is not a junior role. You'll be trusted to work independently, think creatively, and take ownership of output quality and performance.

- Edit UGC-style ads that feel native, authentic, and persuasive

- Edit Video Sales Letters (VSLs) for landing pages, advertorial funnels

- Motion design ads 

- Understand pacing, captions, pattern interrupts, and platform trends



What we're looking for

Hook engineering: you obsess over the first 3–5 seconds and know how to earn the watch 

(e.g. Using Hooks from Viral TikTok Videos / Original Ideas)



Pacing & retention: you can switch between fast aggressive cuts and slower trust-building edits depending on the brief



AI-assisted production: You're comfortable with AI voiceovers (11labs),  AI talking heads (HeyGen), generative B-roll (Higgsfield, Sora, Grok, Claude, Gemini Nano Banana), upscaling, and generative fills when footage is limited. 



Creative ownership: You don't just execute briefs, you improve them with better hooks, editing style, right choice of music



Brand consistency:  motion graphics, captions, sound design, and overlays that feel cohesive, not slapped on



Multi-project management: you handle a queue without needing to be chased



Our Measure Of Success: 

You'll work closely with our creative and media buying team to analyse what's working and why. 

We don't just ship and forget,  we look at the data and iterate.



How We Hire: 

1) Send us your work first

- Drop 2–3 examples of performance ad edits with your application 

If your portfolio covers both animation and video editing, that goes a long way. 



We go through every submission personally, so if it's not the right fit we'll tell you quickly rather than leave you hanging. 

No portfolio = no progression 





2) A short un-paid trial edit

If your work looks like a match, we'll send over a real brief from our creative pipeline. 

You'll have a brief  & asset links to start with. 

This is how we see how you actually work, not just what your finished edits look like.



3) A quick conversation

A short call with our creative team to understand your thought process about how you think, what tools you use, and how you'd fit into how we work.



Sample Videos: 


 (Pure AI Animation Ads) 


 (Mix Of AI UGC + B-roll Ads) 


 (AI Talking Head + B-roll Ads)

title: Canva Graphic Designer + Content Creator (1 Daily News Post)
description:
Type of Employment: Part-Time (5–10 hrs/week)



Description:

I post daily content across social media and need a reliable Canva designer who can also create simple captions/content.



You will create 1 high-quality social media post per day, including both the graphic and caption, based on news articles or trending topics.



You do NOT need to write everything from scratch — you can adapt captions from similar posts and edit them to fit the content. The key is speed, clarity, and consistency.



What you’ll do:

• Create 1 daily social media post (graphic + caption)

• Use existing posts/news as inspiration and adapt content

• Design a clean, eye-catching Canva graphic

• Edit and refine captions based on similar examples

• Keep messaging simple, clear, and engaging

• Deliver within 24 hours (same-day turnaround is a bonus)

• Maintain a consistent style and tone



You’re perfect if you:

• Are highly efficient with Canva (this is a MUST)

• Can quickly adapt and edit captions from existing content

• Have a good eye for simple, engaging social media posts

• Have strong attention to detail (design + wording)

• Communicate clearly and respond quickly

• Are reliable and consistent day-to-day



Important:

• Must be able to both adapt content and design

• No missed days or late delivery

• Strong communication is essential



Perks:

• Long-term, stable role with low hours

• Simple, repeatable daily workflow

• Opportunity to increase workload over time

• Performance-based growth opportunities



To apply:

Send examples of your Canva/social media work.

Start your application with the word “CREATOR” so I know you’ve read everything.



Also include:

• Your turnaround time for 1 post (graphic + caption)

• Your Canva experience and experience writing captions

• 2–3 examples of similar posts

• Your rate per post

title: Super Star Senior SEO Strategist / SEO Lead (Remote)
description:
Strategy-focused | Long-term | Independent role



We are Maven Collection, a design-led travel and villa rental brand operating across multiple international destinations. Our focus is on high-intent organic traffic, strong keyword foundations, and long-term SEO systems, rather than high-volume or short-term growth tactics.



We are creating a brand-new role for an experienced SEO Strategist to take full ownership of our organic search strategy.



This is not a content upload role and not a junior SEO position. We are looking for someone who is confident owning strategy, research, and structure — and who enjoys building SEO foundations properly.



The Role



You will lead SEO strategy end-to-end, working closely with the founders and content team.



You will not be responsible for day-to-day WordPress uploads. Instead, you will define:

 • What content should be created

 • How it should be structured and optimised

 • Which keywords matter and why

 • How performance is measured and improved



Key Responsibilities



SEO Strategy & Architecture

 • Build and own the overall SEO strategy

 • Define keyword architecture (primary, secondary, semantic clusters)

 • Map keywords to destinations, villa pages, experiences, and editorial content

 • Identify quick wins vs long-term opportunities



Advanced Keyword Research

 • In-depth keyword research using professional tools

 • Search intent analysis and SERP evaluation

 • Competitor and gap analysis

 • Keyword clustering and content mapping



On-Page & Technical Guidance

 • On-page optimisation frameworks (titles, meta, headers, internal linking)

 • SEO-led content briefs

 • Internal linking strategy at scale

 • Collaborate on technical SEO improvements (crawlability, indexing, Core Web Vitals)



Tools & Data

You should be confident using tools such as:

 • Ahrefs or SEMrush

 • Google Search Console

 • Google Analytics (GA4)

 • RankMath or Yoast

 • Screaming Frog, Sitebulb or similar crawlers

 • Keyword clustering and SERP analysis tools



Measurement & Reporting

 • Define SEO KPIs that reflect business goals

 • Track rankings, traffic quality, and conversions

 • Communicate insights clearly to non-technical stakeholders

 • Iterate strategy based on data, not assumptions



Who We’re Looking For



Essential

 • 5+ years hands-on SEO experience

 • Proven experience building SEO strategy from the ground up

 • Deep keyword research expertise

 • Strong understanding of search intent and SERP behaviour

 • Comfortable working independently and owning decisions

 • Clear, structured communicator



Nice to Have

 • Experience in travel, real estate, or editorial brands

 • WordPress experience

 • International SEO exposure



Engagement & Compensation

 • Flexible engagement (monthly retainer or part-time hours)

 • Long-term collaboration

 • Competitive compensation based on experience and agreed deliverables



How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A brief overview of your SEO experience

 2. Examples of SEO strategies you’ve built or led

 3. Tools you use regularly and how you use them

 4. One SEO win you’re proud of (and why it worked)

 5. Your preferred working setup (hours / retainer / availability)



Please include the word “Maven” somewhere in your application.

title: Virtual Level 1 Support Analyst
description:
About Us



At Schnitz, we are passionate about bringing people together over delicious, fresh, hand-crafted schnitzels. With over 80 stores across Australia, we’re on a mission to make healthy, feel-good food that tastes great and makes people happy.

You can check us out here: 
/?srsltid=AfmBOoqJ222g9_qcc79-wDHM6sZJsGVDN1Ua6F7MoWmz48OdgaDVQu_f



We are now looking for two Virtual Level 1 Support Analysts to join our growing team and help us deliver exceptional IT support to our franchisees and internal teams.



The Role



As a Virtual Level 1 Support Analyst, you’ll be the first point of contact for our franchisees and staff, providing friendly and efficient technical support. You’ll handle inquiries via phone,
, and our ticketing system, helping to keep our POS systems, networks, and back-of-house applications running smoothly.



You’ll also assist the IT Team with administrative tasks and ensure we deliver consistent, high-quality IT service across our network.



This is a remote role supporting Australian hours, so flexibility to work rotational shifts (including weekends and public holidays) is essential.



Key Responsibilities



Provide Level 1 technical support for:

*POS systems

*Internet and Wi-Fi networks

*Back-of-house applications

*Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues remotely.

*Monitor systems to proactively identify and address potential issues.

*Install, configure, and maintain software across the Schnitz network.

*Escalate complex problems to senior IT staff when needed.

*Maintain accurate records of i
, resolutions, and processes.

*Provide user training and guidance to hospitality staff when required.

*Support data security and compliance with IT policies and local regulations.

*Collaborate with the on-site IT team to ensure seamless service delivery.



About You



Experience in remote IT support or service desk roles (preferred).

Familiarity with remote support tools (e.g. TeamViewer) and restaurant/QSR systems (advantageous).

Solid understanding of Windows/Mac OS, networking basics, and cloud-based tools.

Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

A customer-focused, solution-oriented mindset.

Flexible to work rotational shifts, including weekends and public holidays.



Why Join Us?



Be part of a growing, supportive team in a national brand.

Work remotely and support a business that’s all about great food and happy people.

Opportunity to grow your IT skills in a fast-paced hospitality environment.



Ready to apply?



If you’re passionate about IT support and think this role is for you, please click the link below to apply.





Please note: we will not be responding on this platform, so please apply through the link above. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Kind Regards,



The Schnitz Team

title: Senior SEO Strategist (Client-Facing, Remote)
description:
Company Description

We specialize in delivering impactful Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and related services that drive real, measurable growth. SEO is not a checkbox for us—it’s a core business strategy. We help brands move beyond chasing rankings to achieving tangible outcomes such as qualified leads, revenue growth, and long-term market visibility.



Our work is rooted in thoughtful strategy, clear execution, and consistent progress. We partner closely with our clients to tailor SEO approaches to their specific business models, competitive landscapes, and growth goals—particularly within local SEO and home services industries. As search evolves with AI and LLM-driven discovery, we stay ahead of the curve to ensure our clients remain visible where and how customers search.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a Senior SEO Strategist to lead the SEO strategy and day-to-day execution for a portfolio of clients. This is a client-facing, hands-on role responsible for owning strategy, guiding execution, managing expectations, and delivering results.



You will act as the primary SEO lead for your clients—translating business goals into clear SEO roadmaps, collaborating with internal copy and development teams, and communicating progress in a way that clients understand and trust.



While SEO is the priority, the person in this role should be an expert story-teller and be able to create presentations that allow clients to get buy-in with shareholders. This role is almost 50/50 building client presentations and driving SEO results.



This is a full-time, remote role, with required working-hour overlap with US Central and Eastern Time zones.



Key Responsibilities



Client Strategy & Leadership:

Own SEO strategy for a portfolio of clients, primarily in local SEO and home services

Serve as the primary SEO point of contact, leading client calls and strategic discussions

Create presentations that show expertise and strategic guidance

Develop and present SEO roadmaps, performance reviews, and strategic recommendations

Tell a clear, compelling story with data—connecting SEO efforts to business outcomes

Set realistic expectations, communicate trade-offs, and proactively manage client concerns



SEO Execution & Oversight:

Lead keyword research, competitive analysis, and SEO audits

Define and oversee on-page SEO strategies, internal linking, content optimization, and technical recommendations

Guide and evaluate link-building and authority-building strategies

Monitor performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other SEO platforms (Ahrefs and LocalFalcon)

Translate insights into actionable next steps for clients and internal teams



LLM & AI Search Discoverability:

Incorporate LLM and AI-driven search considerations into SEO strategies (e.g., entity optimization, topical authority, content structure, and semantic relevance)

Optimize content and site architecture for discoverability in AI-powered search experiences and answer engines

Stay informed on evolving search behavior related to generative AI and adapt strategies accordingly



Cross-Team Collaboration:

Work closely with copywriters, developers, and other specialists to ensure SEO recommendations are implemented fully and correctly

Provide clear briefs, feedback, and prioritization to move work from strategy to completion

Ensure timelines, deliverables, and quality standards are met across teams



Scheduling & Time Zone Expectations:

Must be able to schedule and attend client calls with overlap into US Central and Eastern Time

Occasional flexibility is expected for infrequent client calls outside overlapping hours

Strong ability to manage calendars, set boundaries, and coordinate schedules proactively



Qualifications & Experience Required:

5+ years of hands-on SEO experience, with a strong emphasis on strategy

Proven experience with local SEO and home services clients (both required)

Demonstrated success through case studies showing measurable SEO results



Strong expertise in:

Keyword research and SEO audits

On-page SEO and content optimization

Link-building strategies

Web analytics and performance analysis

Experience using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and similar SEO platforms

Excellent communication skills—able to explain complex SEO concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple clients simultaneously



Preferred:

Experience working in an agency or client-services environment

Familiarity with technical SEO concepts and collaborating with development teams

Demonstrated curiosity and adaptability as search evolves with AI and LLMs



What Success Looks Like in This Role:

Clients clearly understand why you’re recommending specific SEO actions

SEO strategies are aligned with real business goals—not vanity metrics

Work moves smoothly from strategy ? execution ? completion

Clients trust you to guide them through SEO wins, challenges, and trade-offs

You proactively adapt strategies as search behavior and technology evolve

title: US Bookkeeper - Full-time (Accounting firm)
description:
Job Title: US Bookkeeper

Location: [Remote}

Type: Full-Time



We are a growing CPA firm providing accounting, tax, and advisory services to small and mid-sized businesses. We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented bookkeeper to support our clients and internal team with accurate and timely financial reporting.



Position Overview

The Bookkeeper will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records for multiple clients. This role requires strong attention to detail, the ability to manage deadlines, and experience working in a CPA firm or professional accounting environment.



Key Responsibilities

             •           Maintain full-cycle bookkeeping for multiple clients

             •           Record and reconcile bank and credit card accounts

             •           Process accounts payable and accounts receivable

             •           Prepare and post journal entries

             •           Maintain general ledgers and supporting schedules

             •           Perform monthly and year-end reconciliations

             •           Assist with month-end and year-end close

             •           Prepare financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

             •           Communicate with clients to resolve discrepancies

             •           Support CPAs with workpapers for tax filings and audits

             •           Maintain organized digital records

 

Must-Have Requirements

> Minimum 3 years of hands-on US bookkeeping or accounting experience

> Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks Online (Xero is a plus)

> Experience supporting US-based clients or businesses

> Solid understanding of US accounting practices and month-end close

> High attention to detail and strong reliability with deadlines



Nice-to-Have / Bonus

Prior experience working in a US accounting firm or CPA/public accounting firm

Client-facing communication experience with US clients

Exposure to automation or accounting tech tools (e.g., Dext, Hubdoc, 
, Gusto, Zapier)

Experience improving or streamlining bookkeeping workflows

Strong written communication skills for async, remote work



TO APPLY: answer screening questions with your CV



1) Please describe your US bookkeeping or accounting experience in detail. (Include: years of experience, type of US clients supported, and whether this was firm-based or in-house etc.)



2) What accounting software have you personally used for US clients (e.g., QuickBooks Online, Xero)?

Walk us through the actual tasks you owned, not just assisted with.



3) Month-End Close

Describe your month-end close process for a US client. What do you usually complete, review, or flag before close?



4) This role requires full US EST working hours (approx. 9am–6pm EST).

Please confirm your ability to work this schedule full-time, long-term, and explain any limitations upfront.



5) Share your Target Salary in USD/month

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: Facebook ADS Launcher
description:
Dear,

We are currently expanding our advertising operations and are looking for a
 Ads Launcher to join our team for a long-term collaboration.

We run campaigns in both English and Spanish markets, so it is important that you are comfortable working in English. Spanish is a plus, but if you don't speak Spanish you can simply use a translator when needed.

We are looking for someone analytical, results-driven, and able to follow campaign structures and processes carefully.

Please apply with the word "strawberry" before introducing yourself so we know you have read the full description.

Please answer the following questions if you are interested:



Do you have experience launching and managing
 & Instagram Ads?

Do you have experience setting up campaigns, ad sets, and ads inside Meta Ads Manager?

Do you have experience working with CBO and ABO campaign structures?

Are you comfortable analyzing metrics such as ROAS, CTR, CPC, and CPM?

Are you available to work around 3 hours per day?



Requirements

As a
 Ads Launcher you should have:



Hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager (required)

Understanding of campaign objectives, audiences, and bidding strategies

Ability to follow clear campaign structures and processes

Basic understanding of ecommerce funnels and product ads

Good organization and attention to detail

Ability to communicate with the team through WhatsApp



Your duties will include:



Launching
 & Instagram ad campaigns following our instructions

Setting up campaigns, ad sets, audiences, and creatives

Monitoring daily performance and flagging issues or opportunities

Scaling winning ad sets and pausing underperformers

Updating our campaign tracking sheet with results and status

Communicating with the team via WhatsApp



Work schedule



Approximately 3 hours per day

Long-term collaboration



If you have experience with
 Ads and are interested in growing with us, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Experienced VA
description:
Please do not apply if you do not know how to create shipping labels, know how to list and find products and wholesalers, or have no experience ungating products. 



Position Overview



We are looking for a detail-oriented and results-driven Virtual Assistant to support our Amazon wholesale/FBA business. This role focuses on product sourcing, profitability analysis, supplier communication, and account management inside Seller Central.



?



???? Key Responsibilities



???? Product Sourcing & ASIN Research

 • Identify profitable products from wholesale suppliers and online sources

 • Find and analyze ASINs for resale opportunities

 • Evaluate ROI, profit margins, and sales rank using tools (Keepa, SellerAmp, RevSeller)

 • Ensure products meet company sourcing criteria before submission



?



???? Product Analysis & Data Review

 • Analyze Keepa charts (price history, Buy Box trends, sales rank)

 • Determine product demand and competition levels

 • Track product performance and flag risks (price drops, IP issues, saturation)



?



???? Supplier & Wholesaler Communication

 • Reach out to wholesalers, brands, and distributors via
 or phone

 • Negotiate pricing, MOQs, and bulk discounts

 • Build and maintain supplier relationships

 • Request and manage invoices for Amazon compliance



?



???? Inventory & Barcode Management

 • Create and manage product listings in Amazon Seller Central

 • Generate and manage FNSKU barcodes

 • Ensure correct labeling and product matching before shipment

 • Coordinate with prep centers for shipment accuracy



?



????? Seller Central Management

 • Manage product listings and inventory inside Amazon Seller Central

 • Monitor Buy Box performance and pricing

 • Assist with order tracking, shipments, and inbound inventory

 • Resolve basic account issues and flag urgent problems



?



???? Pricing & Buy Box Support

 • Assist with repricing strategies using tools like BQool

 • Monitor competitor pricing

 • Help maintain competitive pricing to increase Buy Box win rate



?



? Requirements (MUST HAVE)

 • ? Experience with Amazon Seller Central

 • ? Strong experience with barcode management (FNSKU labeling)

 • ? Proven ability to find profitable ASINs

 • ? Experience with wholesale sourcing and supplier outreach

 • ? Ability to negotiate with wholesalers and distributors

 • ? Strong understanding of Keepa charts and product analysis

 • ? Experience using tools like SellerAmp, RevSeller, or similar

 • ? Reliable high-speed internet (strong WiFi connection required)

 • ? Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

 • ? Strong attention to detail and ability to follow SOPs



?



? Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

 • Experience with prep centers (shipment coordination)

 • Knowledge of ungating/brand approvals

 • Experience with repricing tools (BQool or similar)

 • Familiarity with InventoryLab or similar tools



?



???? Performance Expectations

 • Submit a minimum number of qualified leads per day/week

 • Maintain accuracy in product analysis and data reporting

 • Contribute to increasing Buy Box % and overall sales

 • Communicate clearly and consistently with the team



?



???? Work Setup

 • Remote position

 • Flexible hours (must align with business needs)

 • Must have a quiet workspace and reliable internet

title: Graphic Designer Full Time  (PST Time Zone)
description:
We are hiring a full-time Social Media Stories and Graphic Designer to join our growing marketing company. This role focuses on creating Instagram stories, thumbnails, and feed graphics for multiple brands, including med spas, plastic surgeons, hair restoration clinics, dermatology practices, real estate brands, barbers, nail technicians, and more.

This position is not focused on heavy video editing. The priority is strong visual design, creativity, and the ability to consistently produce high-quality content at scale.



Responsibilities

-Create approximately 30 Instagram stories per day across multiple client accounts

-Design Instagram stories, thumbnails, and feed graphics

-Use AI tools to generate and enhance images is a must 

-Design primarily using Canva and/or Photoshop

-Light video work such as simple story animations or text overlays

-Follow brand guidelines while keeping content clean, modern, and engaging

-Manage multiple brands while meeting daily deadlines



Requirements

-Strong graphic design skills

-Advanced experience using AI image generation tools

-Proficient in Canva and/or Photoshop

-Strong understanding of Instagram layouts, trends, and visual storytelling

-Ability to work efficiently under daily production demands

-Creative, reliable, and detail-oriented

-Must be able to work on Pacific Standard Time (PST) schedule



Position Details

-Full-time role

-40 hours per week

-Monday through Friday

-9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

-Monthly Pay: $300

-Long-term position with strong growth opportunities as the company scales



How to Apply

To be considered, your first message must include:

-Your portfolio

-Examples of Instagram stories, thumbnails, or feed posts

-A brief explanation of your experience with AI image generation

-A short paragraph explaining why you would be a great fit for this role and how you see yourself growing with our company



?? Applications that do not include all of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Full Stack Engineer - New Zealand-based SaaS
description:
We're hiring on behalf of a New Zealand-based SaaS company that's building something people actually use. 



They need a full-stack engineer, possibly two, depending on who's out there,  to join a small, focused product team and help them keep building.



The role is hands-on across the whole stack. You'll be working with ASP.NET on the back end, React.js on the front, PostgreSQL for data, and AWS for infrastructure. You don't need to be an expert in all four, but you should be genuinely comfortable across the full stack and honest about where your strengths sit.



This is a remote, full-time position based in the Philippines. You'll be working closely with a tight-knit NZ team, so clear communication and the ability to work independently across time zones matter as much as your technical chops.



Please include your CV with your application as well as some examples of projects you've been involved in. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
salary: PHP70-120k per month depending on exp.

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.

title: Experienced Xero Bookkeeper
description:
Xero Bookkeeper.      ** Please do not apply unless you are available to start immediately.**



6-8 hours a day/5 days a week (Immediate start and work hours may be flexible for the right candidate)



Company Overview



Millers Projects Pty Ltd is a leading construction company specialising in high end residential building projects based in Sydney, Australia. With a reputation for excellence and a commitment to delivering high-quality construction solutions, we pride ourselves on our ability to manage and complete projects on time, within budget, and to the highest standards. Our team of skilled professionals is dedicated to providing exceptional service and innovative construction solutions to our clients.



Job Overview



** Please do not apply unless you are available to start immediately.**



We are seeking an experienced Virtual Assistant bookkeeper who is highly proficient in both Xero Payroll and Xero accounting functions. 



Applicant must be honest, reliable and detail-oriented with proven hands-on experience in Xero, payroll processing, and data entry. The successful candidate will provide a high level of administrative support to ensure the smooth day-to-day operation of the business.



Key Responsibilities



Accounting & Xero Duties



* Perform daily data entry into Xero with a high level of accuracy

* Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards

* Raise and process invoices

* Assist with accounts payable and accounts receivable

* Support reporting processes

* Liaise with on-site Administrator as required

* Provide regular reports to CEO



Payroll



* Process weekly payroll accurately and on time using Xero Payroll

* Maintain employee records, leave balances, and payroll data

* Ensure compliance with relevant payroll legislation, tax, and superannuation requirements



Data Entry 



* Enter and update data across accounting and payroll systems

* Ensure data integrity and confidentiality at all times

* Identify and correct discrepancies or errors

* Ensure GST correct on all bills/purchases



Administration & Office Support



* Provide general administrative support, when needed, to senior management

* Assist with document preparation, reports, and internal communications

* Collaborate with with on-site Administrator when required



Skills & Experience



Essential



* Proven experience as a Bookkeeper or similar role

* Hands-on experience using Xero (mandatory)

* Payroll processing experience

* Strong data entry skills with excellent attention to detail

* Good understanding of basic accounting principles

* Strong organisational and time management skills



Desirable



* Certificate or qualification in Business Administration, Accounting, or Payroll

* Experience working in a small to medium-sized business

* Knowledge of local payroll and employment legislation

* Experience working with job-management or construction software such as Buildertrend (training can be provided) 



Personal Attributes



* Highly organised and reliable

* Strong attention to detail and accuracy

title: Social Media Marketer & Media Buyer
description:
ABOUT CHAIN LIGHTNING DESIGN AND MEDIA



Chain Lightning Design and Media is a live design and marketing agency that operates through "Design Shows" — real-time client sessions where branding, logos, web assets, and marketing campaigns are produced and iterated on the spot. We combine senior-level design and marketing into one connected system, not separate silos. Our clients see work evolve in real time, give feedback immediately, and launch faster than they thought possible.



We're building a world-class team of designers, creators, and marketers who produce impossibly fast and high-quality results. Good work is rewarded here — we compensate above industry average and invest in our people.



THE ROLE



You'll be part of our Marketing Production Team, working alongside our branding, creative, and design teams during live Design Shows and ongoing Encore (retention) campaigns. This is a hands-on, full-stack marketing role — you'll touch everything from paid ads to organic content to
 funnels.



During Design Shows, you'll work in parallel with other production teams to:

• Set up and configure social media accounts 
, Instagram — TikTok coming soon)

• Launch paid ad campaigns using assets produced live by the branding and creative teams

• Calculate cost projections and ROI targets — what does profitability look like for this client?

• Forecast expected results based on ad spend — given a budget, you should be able to project reach, leads, conversions, and revenue with confidence

• Define campaign goals with the client: conversions, leads, reach, or sales

• Produce 10–50+ ad variations per show — volume and iteration matter here



For Encore (ongoing client campaigns), you'll:

• Run and optimize live paid campaigns across Meta 
/Instagram), Google Ads, and other platforms

• Manage budgets, monitor ROAS, and iterate based on performance data

• Build and manage
/SMS marketing funnels — from list building to drip sequences

• Develop organic content calendars, write copy, and grow engaged audiences

• Pull weekly analytics and present clear reports on what's working and what needs to change

• Coordinate with the creative team for fresh ad assets,
 templates, and social content



WHO YOU ARE



• You have real, hands-on experience running paid ad campaigns on Meta, Google, or TikTok — you've managed budgets and can speak to ROAS, CPA, and conversion metrics

• You understand organic social strategy beyond just scheduling posts — you know how to grow and engage communities

• You can set up
 marketing funnels (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Drip, or similar) and understand automation sequences

• You turn data into action — you're comfortable with analytics tools and can tell a story with numbers

• You write compelling ad copy, social posts, and
 content — clear, punchy, on-brand

• You're fast, organized, and can manage multiple client campaigns at once without dropping balls

• You communicate proactively — no surprises, no radio silence, no waiting to be asked

• You thrive in a fast-paced, live environment where things move quickly and iteration is constant

• You can work across both PST and PhST time zones — this is essential, as our team and clients operate across the US and the Philippines



Bonus points:

• Experience with Hootsuite, Hyros, or similar social media management/tracking tools

• Familiarity with landing page builders and conversion optimization

• Comfort working with designers in Figma, FigJam, or Canva for creative briefs and asset reviews

• Understanding of e-commerce marketing (Shopify, Klaviyo, product launches)



WHY CLDM



• Above-average compensation — we pay well because we expect excellent work

• Creative, high-energy team — our Design Shows are collaborative, fast, and genuinely fun

• Variety — no two clients or campaigns are alike; you'll work across industries and challenges

• Growth opportunity — we're scaling fast and building roles from the ground up; early tea
mbers shape how things run

• Global team — you'll collaborate across time zones with a distributed crew that moves fast



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message with:

1. Examples of campaigns you've managed (paid or organic) — results and metrics matter more than polish

2. Your resume

3. Answer this question: "How do you manage a budget for a media campaign?"

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
We’re a fast-growing eCommerce brand in the health, recovery, and pain-relief space



We’re a fast-growing eCommerce brand in the health, recovery, and pain-relief space



We’re looking for a full-time Video Editor who can take raw footage, ideas, and scripts and turn them into scroll-stopping, conversion-focused videos across paid channels.



Ideally, you can do both with video editing and animation.



Note: This is not a junior role. You'll be trusted to work independently, think creatively, and take ownership of output quality and performance.



What You’ll Be Responsible For: Create direct-response ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Google



- Edit UGC-style ads that feel native, authentic, and persuasive

- Edit Video Sales Letters (VSLs) for landing pages, advertorial funnels

- Motion design ads

- Understand pacing, captions, pattern interrupts, and platform trends



What we're looking for

Hook engineering: you obsess over the first 3–5 seconds and know how to earn the watch

(e.g. Using Hooks from Viral TikTok Videos / Original Ideas)



Pacing & retention: you can switch between fast aggressive cuts and slower trust-building edits depending on the brief



AI-assisted production: You're comfortable with AI voiceovers (11labs), AI talking heads (HeyGen), generative B-roll (Higgsfield, Sora, Grok, Claude, Gemini Nano Banana), upscaling, and generative fills when footage is limited.



Creative ownership: You don't just execute briefs, you improve them with better hooks, editing style, right choice of music



Brand consistency: motion graphics, captions, sound design, and overlays that feel cohesive, not slapped on



Multi-project management: you handle a queue without needing to be chased



Our Measure Of Success:

You'll work closely with our creative and media buying team to analyse what's working and why.

We don't just ship and forget, we look at the data and iterate.



How We Hire:

1) Send us your work first

- Drop 2–3 examples of performance ad edits with your application

If your portfolio covers both animation and video editing, that goes a long way.



We go through every submission personally, so if it's not the right fit we'll tell you quickly rather than leave you hanging.

No portfolio = no progression





2) A short unpaid trial edit

If your work looks like a match, we'll send over a real brief from our creative pipeline.

You'll have a brief & asset links to start with.

This is how we see how you actually work, not just what your finished edits look like.



3) A quick conversation

A short call with our creative team to understand your thought process about how you think, what tools you use, and how you'd fit into how we work.



Sample Videos:


/ad/a1e7a6c1617a94f5fa7db2883a6fd60eb (Pure AI Animation Ads)


/ad/ace50439d52e2498eaeeda746d078b0e0 (Mix Of AI UGC + B-roll Ads)


/ad/a7dbe390d
a898319da4a758e3c (AI Talking Head + B-roll Ads)

title: E - Commerce Video Editor
description:
Overview

We are seeking an exceptional, data-driven Video Editor obsessed with driving conversions for e-commerce/DTC brands. This is a fast-paced role requiring a marketer's mindset, platform expertise, and rapid iteration based on performance data.



Core Responsibilities (What You Will Do)

Conversion Focus: Edit raw footage (often UGC-style) into scroll-stopping, short-form ads (15-60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube, focused entirely on driving sales.



DR Implementation: Structure videos using Direct Response (DR) frameworks (e.g., Problem-Agitate-Solution), ensuring a powerful hook in the first 3 seconds, and seamless CTA integration.



Technical Execution: Apply advanced post-production techniques: color grading, audio mixing, speed ramping, dynamic transitions, and creating engaging typography/subtitles.



Rapid Iteration: Maintain fast turnaround (24 for first cuts) and produce multiple testing variations based on performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, Hook Rate).



Platform Mastery: Optimize content (9:16, 1:1, etc.) for native feel and best practices across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Ads.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

Experience: Proven portfolio of successful e-commerce/DTC ad editing (not just cinematic/corporate work).



Software Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro.



Mindset: Deep understanding of DR Marketing and key metrics (ROAS, CTR). Must be performance-driven, flexible, and willing to iterate based on data without ego.



Skills: Expertise in UGC-style editing, audio/sound design, and closed captioning/subtitles.



Bonus Skills

Proficiency in After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve.



Familiarity with ad platforms and marketing metrics.



Workload: Initial paid trial, then transitioning to 10 - 20 hours per week ongoing.



Shift: Flexible hours; work is output-based with strict deadlines.

If you are an exceptional designer with a portfolio that demonstrates world-class DTC brand quality, kindly fill out the application form:






Looking forward to receiving your application!

title: Construction Estimator Civil
description:
Project Estimator – Work From Home / Remote

Job Description



We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Project Estimator to join our growing team in a remote work-from-home setup.



The successful candidate will be responsible for preparing accurate and competitive cost estimates for civil, architectural, and HVAC-related projects, ensuring alignment with project specifications, client requirements, and company targets.



This role is ideal for professionals who can work independently, communicate effectively in a virtual environment, and manage multiple estimation tasks remotely.



Key Responsibilities

Review project plans, drawings, and technical specifications

Prepare detailed cost estimates for civil, architectural, and HVAC works, including materials, labor, and equipment

Perform quantity take-offs for concrete, masonry, finishes, structural components, ducting, piping, and other building systems

Prepare quantity estimates for architectural finishes such as flooring, ceiling, painting, partitions, doors, windows, and roofing

Source quotations from suppliers and subcontractors

Prepare and submit bid proposals, tender documents, and cost breakdowns

Coordinate with engineers, architects, project managers, and clients

Attend online pre-bid meetings and project coordination discussions as required

Ensure compliance with local building codes, project specifications, and industry standards

Maintain updated cost databases, estimate templates, and project records

Qualifications

Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Architecture, or related field

Licensed Engineer or Architect is an advantage

At least 2–5 years of experience in construction estimating

Strong knowledge of civil, architectural, and HVAC systems

Proficient in AutoCAD, PlanSwift / Bluebeam, and Microsoft Excel

Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and specifications

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Excellent communication and organizational skills

Ability to work efficiently in a remote work environment

Why Join Us?

Competitive salary and benefits package

Work from the comfort of your home

Career growth and development opportunities

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
MUST SEND A 60 SECOND LOOM WITH YOUR EXPERIENCE TO BE CONSIDERED FOR POSITION!



Virtual Assistant for Credit Repair and Financial Literacy



Location: Remote



Are you passionate about helping others achieve financial freedom and literacy? We are seeking a skilled Virtual Assistant to join our team and assist clients in disputing inaccurate credit reports and navigating the complex world of credit repair and financial literacy.



YOU MUST RECORD A 2 MIN OR 60 SECOND VIDEO EXPLAINING YOUR KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ALONG WITH PROVEN RESULTS OF YOUR WORK OR YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities:

- Dispute inaccurate credit reports on behalf of clients, adhering to the laws outlined in the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

- File complaints with consumer protection agencies such as the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), Better Business Bureau (BBB), and Attorney General's office when necessary.

- Utilize extensive knowledge of the credit repair process in America to provide expert guidance and support to clients.

- Communicate effectively with clients to address their concerns, answer inquiries, and provide updates on the dispute process.

- Demonstrate true determination and heart in advocating for clients' rights and financial well-being.



Qualifications:

- Previous experience working with a credit repair company, with a strong understanding of the credit repair process.

- Extensive knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and other relevant laws governing credit reporting and repair.

- Proven ability to file complaints with consumer protection agencies, such as the CFPB, BBB, and Attorney General's office.

- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to empathize and connect with clients.

- True determination and heart to help clients overcome financial challenges and achieve their goals.



Benefits:

- Flexible remote work environment.

- Opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the lives of others.

- Competitive compensation package.



If you have a passion for helping others and possess the skills and qualifications listed above, we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team and make a difference in the world of credit repair and financial literacy.



3 Commas Solutions is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or other protected status.

 post ? user comments “GUIDE” ?

your experience

what systems you’ve built

live link

screenshots of setup

brief explanation

title: Bookkeeper
description:

/bepartofourteam



SUMMARY

We're looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeper with hands-on experience in US accounting and tax compliance. You'll own our books, ensure accuracy across all financial records, and keep us compliant — while also supporting client-facing operations and general administrative functions. The right candidate is numbers-first, communicates well, and can manage financial work alongside operational support without dropping the ball on either.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Verify transactions are recorded accurately across day books, supplier ledgers, client ledgers, and the general ledger

Process accounts payable and receivable in a timely manner

Handle payroll processing and ensure accuracy

Complete and file US tax forms; support quarterly and annual tax preparation

Manage invoices, receipts, and payment records

Generate financial reports and statements

Ensure compliance with US accounting standards and tax regulations

Build and document bookkeeping processes and SOPs



Customer Service & Client Support

, phone, and support platforms

Process orders, forms, applications, and service requests

Maintain detailed records of customer interactions and feedback

Support CRM updates and database maintenance

Administrative Support



 management: sorting, filtering, responding, and follow-ups

General file and records management





REQUIREMENTS

Non-Negotiable

title: Senior IT Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: [URGENT] Guest Support Specialist – Direct Hire
description:
The Mission:

Join Luxostays, an established property management company with 8 years of industry expertise in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are not a hiring agency; you will be working directly for our internal team. We are seeking a high-caliber professional who thrives on operational precision, logic-based problem-solving, and the fast-paced nature of short-term rental (STR) management.



Why This Role?

Direct Engagement: Work directly with our leadership team (no middleman or agency).

Stability: Join a company with nearly a decade of success in the SF market.

High-Level Autonomy: We value "High D" personalities who can take command of a situation and drive resolutions without hand-holding.

Systems-Driven: We utilize a sophisticated tech stack (OwnerRez, VRBO, Slack, Time Doctor) for those who appreciate structured, efficient workflows.



The Schedule:

Full-Time (40 hours/week) | PST Timezone.

Rotating shifts including weekends (Business-critical coverage).



Your Core Responsibilities:

Command & Control: Oversee guest reservations, handle complex Airbnb resolutions, and manage security monitoring (CCTV). You are our first line of defense and the final word in guest satisfaction.

Logistics Coordination: Manage the "ripple effect" of turnovers. You will schedule cleaners, verify quality via photo audits, and coordinate specialized vendors (contractors, handymen) directly.

Asset Optimization: Maintain listing integrity across platforms, conduct due diligence research, and execute special administrative projects with 100% accuracy.

What We Require (The High-Standard Filter):

Critical Thinking: You must be able to de-escalate "urgent" maintenance or guest issues using logic and a "High D" approach—firm, fair, and fast.

Technical Proficiency: 2–4+ years in Airbnb/STR Management is mandatory. You must be comfortable with Time Doctor and AI-driven workflows.

The Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet environment, and a dual-monitor setup for maximum multitasking efficiency.

Education: College Degree required.

Compensation & Growth:

Starting Rate: $5/hour (Negotiable based on proven expertise in property operations).



Tiered Rewards: Skill-based pay increases, healthcare options, and year-end performance bonuses after 1 year of consistent excellence within our company.



How to Apply (Follow Precisely):

Failure to follow these instructions will result in immediate disqualification.

: 

Subject Line: [Guest Support Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Attachments: Updated Resume + A Dropbox/Drive link to a 60-second audio intro explaining your specific experience in property management operations.

Compliance Test: At the end of your
, please answer this: Who is the current Prime Minister of London?

title: SEO Specialist (WordPress) for Niche Education Brand – Initial Paid Project ? Ongoing Role
description:
About the Role

I run an education company called Wheelieworx.

We teach occupational therapists and physiotherapists how to prescribe custom wheelchairs.



We already have:

• A live website

• Strong content and testimonials

• Clear positioning



Now we need someone to execute SEO properly.



This is not a strategy role. This is a hands-on implementation role.



Initial Project (Paid Test Task)

Your first job is to fix and improve our current website SEO based on an audit.

This includes:

1. On-Page SEO Fixes

• Add meta descriptions to key pages

• Implement a proper H1 structure (currently missing)

• Improve keyword placement (e.g. “wheelchair and seating education”)

• Clean up headings (H2, H3 hierarchy)



2. Image SEO

• Add alt text to all images (60+ currently missing)



3. Internal Linking

• Add internal links within pages (not just nav links)

• Use keyword-rich anchor text



4. Technical SEO (Basic)

• Check sitemap and indexing

• Improve page speed basics (image compression, formatting)

• Ensure no “work in progress” or hidden pages are indexed



Success Criteria for This Project

At the end of this task, I should see:

• Clean, professional, error-free pages

• Clear keyword usage throughout the site

• Proper heading structure

• All images with alt text

• Faster loading pages

• No obvious SEO gaps remaining



I will review your work with an external tool and advisor.



If This Goes Well

You will move into an ongoing role where you will:

• Help publish 50+ SEO blog posts (I will provide content ideas)

• Optimise each post for ranking

• Build internal linking across the site

• Assist with backlink opportunities

• Continuously improve rankings



Who This Is For

You are a good fit if:

• You have experience working on WordPress sites

• You understand SEO basics clearly (on-page, technical, content)

• You are detail-oriented and don’t miss obvious things

• You can follow instructions and execute without needing constant direction



Important

When you apply, start your message with “Wheelchair SEO” so I know you have read this job. 



Budget: To be determined. Please send me through your price for this gig.

title: Project Manager (GoHighLevel Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a Hybrid Project Manager & GoHighLevel Specialist to own the setup, launch, and ongoing optimization of our digital funnels, automations, and client campaigns. This is a senior execution role for someone who loves turning strategy and Loom videos into well run projects and functioning GoHighLevel systems, not a “figure out our business from scratch” role.

About The Role

You will manage projects from idea to launch, coordinating with the founder and any contractors, while building, maintaining, and improving our GoHighLevel funnels, automations, and pipelines. You’ll thrive if you enjoy keeping a lot of moving pieces organized, documenting as you go, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

We already have offers, strategies, and templates; your job is to execute, refine, and keep launches on track, not to invent everything from zero.



Key Responsibilities

• Turn high-level ideas and Loom instructions into clear, actionable task lists and project plans in our PM tool.

• Build and update GoHighLevel funnels, pipelines, automations, forms, calendars, and
/SMS campaigns using our existing strategies and templates.

• Own launch timelines: coordinate tasks, track progress, follow up with stakeholders, and ensure milestones are hit on time.

• Coordinate with the founder and contractors (copy, design, tech) to ensure deliverables are completed accurately and on schedule.

• Perform thorough QA on funnels and automations before launch so tags, triggers,
s, SMS, and calendars all function correctly.

• Document processes and build simple SOPs as we go, so projects become easier and faster to repeat over time.

• Monitor basic performance metrics in GHL (pipeline movement, show-up rates, contact flow) and flag issues or opportunities for improvement.



Ideal Candidate Profile

You are an organized, proactive operator who enjoys working inside GoHighLevel daily and being the person who keeps everything moving. You pride yourself on reliability, follow through, and being able to take a Loom and quietly get the job done without hand holding.



You have:

• Minimum 5 years experience in project management, operations, or a similar role in online/digital businesses.

• At least 2–3 years hands-on experience inside GoHighLevel (or a very similar CRM/automation platform) building funnels, automations, and appointment pipelines.

• Proven experience turning ideas and voice/video notes into structured tasks, timelines, and well-documented processes.

• Strong attention to detail and the habit of QA’ing your own work before asking for review.

• Clear written English and confidence communicating asynchronously via Slack,
, and Loom.

• Comfort working remotely, managing your own time, and staying accountable to deadlines and outcomes.



Nice to have (not required):

• Experience building funnels and simple landing pages using templates (no custom coding needed).

• Understanding of sales pipelines, lead nurture sequences, and appointment booking flows.

• Familiarity with Google Sheets or similar tools to track simple metrics and task lists.



Tools You’ll Use

• GoHighLevel – for funnels, automations, CRM, and calendars.

• A project management tool (Trello, ClickUp, or similar) – for tasks, timelines, and launch tracking.

• Slack and Loom – for communication, updates, and video walkthroughs.

• Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive) – for documentation and tracking.



Working Style & Hours

• Remote role with flexible hours, as long as agreed deadlines are met and there is some overlap with [insert your primary time zone] for communication.

• Part-time to start (e.g., X–Y hours per week), with potential to increase hours and responsibility as we grow if it’s a strong fit.



Compensation

• Competitive hourly rate or monthly retainer based on experience, skill, and time commitment.

• Clear opportunities to grow into a more senior operations or project leadership role over time for the right person.



How To Apply

Please apply with:

• A short note introducing yourself and highlighting your 5+ years of project management/operations experience and 2–3+ years inside GoHighLevel (or very similar platforms).

• 1–3 brief examples (screenshots or Looms) of funnels and automations you’ve personally built or managed (blur or hide sensitive info).

• A 2 minute Loom (or similar) video where you:

• Explain, in simple terms, what GoHighLevel is and how you’ve used it in past roles.

• Walk through your understanding of funnel building and a basic automation flow (e.g., lead capture ? nurture ? booking).

• Give a quick overview of one funnel or automation you’ve set up before.

• Your expected hourly rate or monthly retainer and your typical weekly availability.

title: Executive Assistant to Founder
description:
I’m a British entrepreneur based in Thailand running four ventures: an AI services agency (ScaleSage), a Caribbean restaurant in Pattaya (Belly Full), a Caribbean seasoning brand launching into UK retail with production in China (Belly Full Seasonings), and internal AI systems for algorithmic trading and business automation.



I operate through voice-to-text, Claude, and Claude Code — I architect systems and my team executes. My bottleneck isn’t strategy, it’s execution bandwidth. I need an Executive Assistant who becomes my second brain.



I’m a founder, not a big corporation. This means two things: I can move fast and make decisions without red tape, and I pay what’s fair without corporate budgets to throw around. The trade-off is real opportunity — the right person here grows with me as the businesses grow.



HOW THIS WORKS



I want to start someone part-time (20-25 hours/week) for the first month as a paid trial. This protects both of us — we find out if we click without either side being locked in. If the fit is right and the work justifies it, we move to full-time hours.



Nothing is promised. Everything is earned. IF we click, IF the work ethic is there, IF the fit is right — this role has real growth potential. Travel opportunities, performance bonuses, eventual in-person/relocated role, and even leading future business arms as we scale. I won’t sell you a dream. I’ll tell you the ceiling is high for the right person.



WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO



Daily operations:



- Manage my calendar and book meetings

- Triage inbox, draft
s in my voice

- Handle admin: account setups, form-filling, registrations

- Chase suppliers and contractors on my behalf



Financial admin:



- Track recurring bills and subscriptions

- Review supplier invoices, spot wasteful spending

- Coordinate with my accountant

- Basic bookkeeping oversight



Research and sourcing:



- Chinese manufacturers (factory trip in May 2026)

- UK retail buyers and market intelligence

- Competitors, legal, regulatory — whatever I need to know



ScaleSage (AI agency) operations:



- Monitor cold
 campaigns (Instantly)

- Manage GoHighLevel sub-accounts

- Handle client onboarding

- Keep the agency running



Content and documentation:



- Create visuals in Canva (social posts, one-pagers)

- Draft documents and SOPs

- Maintain project trackers

- Help with basic content creation for marketing



AI-powered work:



- Access to my Claude Max plan to supercharge your output



MUST HAVE



1. Excellent English — written AND spoken. Your English will be tested during the hiring process.

2. AI-native workflow — you use Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini DAILY. Not negotiable.

3. 2+ years EA or senior VA experience with Western clients

4. Basic financial literacy — invoices, budgets, expense tracking, ability to coordinate with an accountant

5. Canva or equivalent — can create clean professional visuals

6. Research and sourcing ability — you find, compare, recommend

7. Radical honesty — tell me when you’re stuck or made a mistake. Hiding is the fastest way out.

8. Growth mindset — you enjoy learning new tools and tech

9. Reliable internet, quiet workspace, valid passport

10.Proactive initiative—you identify bottlenecks and hurdles before they arise and find solutions.



NICE TO HAVE



- Basic coding understanding (HTML, APIs, no-code tools like Zapier/Airtable)

- AI enthusiast (custom GPTs, Claude Projects, automation tools)

- Content creation experience (CapCut, social media graphics)

- China sourcing experience (Alibaba, Global Sources)

- UK e-commerce or retail familiarity

- GoHighLevel, Shopify, or Etsy experience

- Entrepreneurial mindset — you’ve tried to build something yourself

- Willingness to travel (Thailand, China, expenses covered)

- Openness to relocation long-term if the fit is right



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message with:



1. A 90-second Loom or voice recording introducing yourself. Speak naturally. No script.

2. Answer these questions (one sentence each):



- What AI tool do you use most and what do you use it for?

- What’s the most technical thing you’ve figured out on your own?

- What’s your experience with financial admin or bookkeeping?

- If you had to automate one part of your own daily life right now, what would it be and how?

- Describe a problem you solved without being told how

- Would you be open to traveling to Thailand or China for work if needed?

- Would you be open to relocating eventually if the fit was right?



1. One sentence: what’s your dream for the next five years?





No generic templates. If you used AI to help write your application, just tell me which tool — I respect AI use, I don’t respect pretending.

title: Claude Design + HyperFrames AI Motion Builder (Paid Gig)

To Apply (Required)

Requirements:

Claude (Design / Code workflows)

HyperFrames-style motion workflows

Payment
