Paid for the live teaching session after hiring



Final Note



Most people won’t submit a demo.



That’s intentional.



If you’re the type who:

-> hears about a new tool

-> tests it immediately

-> figures it out fast



Apply.

title: Airbnb & Property Management Rockstar | OwnerRez Expert (PST Shift)
description:
Are you an Airbnb Property Management Rockstar who is fast, efficient, and tech-savvy?



We are an established, San Francisco Bay Area-based property management firm with nearly 8 years of success in the Short-Term Rental (STR/Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rental (LTR) industry. We have built a reputation for excellence, and we are looking for a seasoned professional to join our stable, high-performing team.



We don’t just need "customer service"—we need an Airbnb & Property Management Expert who understands the mechanics of the industry, moves quickly, and never lets a detail slip through the cracks.



Why Join Us?

Proven Stability: Work for a company with an 8-year track record in Airbnb and LTR management.

High-Speed Environment: We value efficiency. If you are fast and productive, you will thrive here.

Professional Standards: We have clear processes in place—no "startup" guesswork.

100% Remote: Long-term, stable remote work from your home office.



The Requirements (Strict)

Please do not apply if you only have general Call Center/BPO experience. We require specific Airbnb and Property Management expertise.

Direct Experience: Minimum 2+ years managing Short-Term Rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rentals.

PMS Mastery: Advanced proficiency in OwnerRez is highly preferred. You should know how to navigate workflows, triggers, and guest communication within the platform.

Operational Speed: Fast-thinking, fast-typing (60+ WPM), and able to handle multiple guest issues simultaneously.



Tech Stack: Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT), Time Doctor, and dual-monitor setups.



Your Responsibilities

Airbnb & Guest Management: Manage inquiries, bookings, and high-stakes resolution cases across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct sites.

Property Oversight: Coordinate check-ins/outs, send lease agreements, and monitor security.

Logistics & Maintenance: Schedule cleaning teams and review quality assurance photos.

Listing Optimization: Maintain and optimize Airbnb listings to ensure maximum occupancy and 5-star reviews.



Compensation & Benefits

Schedule: Pacific Standard Time (PST) | Includes Weekends

Paid Leave: Accrued leave credits after 1 year.

Bonus: Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply

To filter for the high-attention-to-detail candidates we need, please follow these steps exactly:



 your Resume to 
 Introduction: Record a brief intro highlighting your specific experience with OwnerRez, Airbnb, and STR/LTR management. (Share via Dropbox/Google Drive link).

Bonus: End your
 by telling us who the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is.

title: Airbnb and Property Management Expert | High-Precision PMS Specialist
description:
[COMPENSATION & STRUCTURE]

Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (Highly negotiable based on technical tenure).

Schedule: PST Shift | Including Weekends.

Benefits: Performance-based bonuses + Accrued leave credits.

Work Type: Direct-hire, 100% Remote (8-year established company).



[THE ROLE]

We are seeking an experienced Property Management professional to manage a portfolio of San Francisco-based short-term (STR) and long-term (LTR) rentals. We operate at a high velocity and require an individual who is both decisive and meticulous.



This is not a general customer support role. We need an Operations Specialist who understands the technical backend of the industry and can execute complex tasks with speed and total accuracy.



[THE STANDARDS]

Industry Experience: Minimum 2+ years of verified STR/LTR management (Airbnb/VRBO).

Technical Proficiency: You must be a "Power User" of Property Management Software (PMS). We expect you to understand the logic of automated triggers, channel synchronization, and workflow management.

Operational Speed: Minimum 60+ WPM. You must be able to resolve high-stakes issues under pressure without sacrificing quality.

Tech Stack: Advanced use of ChatGPT, Time Doctor, and a dedicated dual-monitor home office.

Accountability: We value professionals who respect deadlines and take full ownership of their responsibilities.



[CORE RESPONSIBILITIES]

Guest Lifecycle Management: Oversight of inquiries, bookings, and high-level resolutions.

Operational Logistics: Coordination of maintenance, cleaning teams, and supply inventory via photo/video verification.

Technical Oversight: Managing lease agreements, security monitoring, and listing optimization.

Systems Audit: Contributing to the refinement of our internal SOPs and automated workflows.



[APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS]

To ensure we are hiring for the necessary attention to detail, please follow these steps exactly:

Resume:
 to 
 Introduction: Share a link (Dropbox/Google Drive) briefly outlining your technical history with PMS platforms.

Subject Line: Must be: [Property Management Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Final Detail: End your
 by identifying the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

title: YouTube Long-Form Editor
description:
I’m on a mission to create world-class educational content that helps people to start and monetise their personal brand online. I’m passionate about this because so many people have knowledge and experiences that need to be shared.

 

Location: Remote

Commitment: Part-Time to Full-Time (2 videos/week)

Compensation: Dependent on experience ($1000 - $1,500 per month)



Please Read Before Applying

This role is only for a high-level, YouTube-first video editor. Please only apply if you have a portfolio ready that shows you can edit to the standard we’re looking for.



About the Role

We're looking for a highly-skilled Video Editor who is passionate about storytelling, loves YouTube, and wants to collaborate long-term to grow a channel focused on content creation and sharing the behind-the-scenes of building a business.



You’ll work closely with the creator (Joe Gannon) in a newly formed Brand Team to publish 2 YouTube videos per week - one a talking-head educational video and the other may be a vlog.



What You'll Do

- Edit 2x long-form YouTube videos per week (length of video TBD)

- Own the entire post-production process: editing, pacing, b-roll, graphics, colour, sound

- Own the production calendar and schedule to ensure a consistent posting time for our audience (we will obsess over how to create a community)

- Help evolve the visual style of the channel

- Occasionally support the wider business on client work (editing YouTube videos, podcasts, or short-form clips) and also wider marketing promo videos for the business

- Stay sharp on creator trends, YouTube content pacing, storytelling styles



My Channel 



You're a Great Fit If You...

- Can emulate educational channels like Ali Abdaal, Shan Hanif, Sahil Bloom and Jay Clouse. For vlogs I like Mr. FourToEight and Sahil Bloom (before he hired a videographer)

- Take creative initiative - not just a task-taker, but a storytelling partner

- Are highly organized and meet deadlines with ease

- Want to grow with a personal brand long-term and take ownership of your work



Success Metrics / KPIs

- 2x videos delivered weekly, on time and within brand standards

- Increasing creative alignment with the brand’s evolving style

- Improved retention through better pacing, hook delivery, and storytelling

- Proactive input during ideation and thumbnail conversations

- Organization: clear file management, streamlined workflows



If interested apply to this link: 



I look forward to hearing from you - thank you for your time!

title: E - Commerce Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Overview

We are seeking a high-energy, execution-focused Outbound Sales Representative to join the team. Based in New York City, we are a "better-for-you" snack brand offering clean-label candied nuts and organic dried mangoes to major distributors and retail partners.



This is a pure execution role with high activity, clear metrics, and no fluff. You will be responsible for high-volume prospecting to engage cold leads, re-activate stalled accounts, and drive reorders from existing customers.



Work Structure & Requirements

Location: Remote (Must have a quiet, professional calling environment).

Schedule: Full-time, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

Requirement: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure total focus on hitting daily activity targets.

Tech Needs: Reliable high-speed internet and strong computer literacy to multitask across sales tools.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Outreach: Execute high-volume outbound
s and daily cold calls to prospects and warm leads.

Account Management: Follow up with inactive accounts and call current customers to facilitate reorders, expansion, or reactivation.

Lead Response: Respond promptly to all inbound calls and
 inquiries.

CRM Discipline: Log all activity accurately in Salesforce, maintaining clean data and clear next steps for every lead.

Performance: Consistently hit daily activity targets and monthly pipeline goals.



Required Skills & Experience

Sales Background: Prior experience in outbound sales, inside sales, or lead generation.

Communication: Fluent English (reading, writing, and speaking) with the ability to write concise, non-spammy cold
s.

Phone Presence: Confident, natural delivery on the phone—no monotone script reading.

Resilience: Comfortable handling objections, basic discovery, and repetitive outreach.

Efficiency: Fast typing skills and high attention to detail.



Traits We Value

Metrics-Driven: Comfortable being measured by clear KPIs and pipeline creation.

Coachable: Open to feedback and a direct communicator who strictly follows the established sales process.

Reliable: Consistent and self-disciplined in a remote work setting.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video introducing yourself.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Overview

We are a fast-growing "better-for-you" snack brand redefining indulgence with clean-label candied nuts and organic dried fruit. We are scaling quickly across retail, distribution, and e-commerce and are building the operational backbone to support that growth.



This is a high-ownership operations role with a direct impact on revenue. You will ensure product moves efficiently from production to shelf while continuously improving how the business operates. This role is for a problem-solver who moves fast and defaults to automation over manual work.



Key Responsibilities

Order Execution & Fulfillment

Own the end-to-end purchase order flow across retail, wholesale, and e-commerce channels.

Ensure all orders are processed, shipped, and delivered accurately and on time.

Manage critical documentation, including invoices, BOLs, routing guides, and labels.

Proactively resolve fulfillment issues before they impact the customer experience.



Sales Operations & Account Readiness

Support new item setups across various retailers and distributors.

Maintain accurate pricing, product data, and sales materials.

Track deductions, trade spend, and promotional activity.

Ensure operational readiness for all new accounts and upcoming product launches.



Supply Chain & Inventory Management

Coordinate production runs directly with co-packers and suppliers.

Manage inventory across warehouses and major distributors, such as UNFI and KeHE.

Monitor stock levels to prevent out-of-stocks or excess inventory.

Track inbound and outbound shipments, resolving any delays immediately.



Systems & AI Automation

Identify inefficiencies and implement scalable systems to improve speed and accuracy.

Use AI tools to automate repetitive tasks across reporting and order management.

Build processes that improve visibility and replace manual work with scalable solutions.



Required Skills & Experience

3–5+ years in operations, supply chain, or logistics.

Experience within the US CPG ecosystem, ideally working with distributors like UNFI or KeHE.

Strong systems mindset with comfort in ERPs, CRMs, spreadsheets, and AI productivity tools.

High attention to detail, ability to move quickly, and capacity to operate independently.



To Apply:

Please send your resume and short loom intro video via messages. Thanks!

title: Creative Strategist - US Market
description:
Fill out form: (ADD PORFOLIO IN FORM)





About Us



We operate a portfolio of performance-led DTC brands across the US and Southeast Asian markets. Our brands are in the 7–8 figure range, and our growth is built entirely on creative research, testing, iteration, and the discipline to do all three at volume.



We run a structured, data-driven creative system. Testing velocity and iteration discipline are what determine how fast we grow. If you want to work somewhere that treats creative strategy as a real performance function, not a vibes-based exercise, this is it.



As a US Creative Strategist, you'll be dedicated to our US market brands, developing and testing concepts for American audiences with the specific buyer psychology, market awareness stages, and offer positioning that move cold traffic in that market.

 

Compensation

This role offers a competitive base salary plus performance-based commissions tied directly to winning concepts that validate and scale. You earn more when your creative drives results - it's that simple.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Research & Concept Development

•   	Developing 15–20 net-new concepts per week across video and image formats. Typically, video concepts make up 70–80% of your weekly output, with image concepts making up the balance; this ratio shifts based on what's scaling and where the priorities are

•   	Conducting deep research into high-impact angles, unique mechanisms, and market awareness stages to develop breakthrough concepts for US audiences

•   	Studying competitive intelligence (ad spying), consumer psychology, mass desire, and internal winners to identify untapped opportunities specific to the US market

•   	Building concepts that are rooted in how American buyers think, what they respond to, and what's already saturated in the market



Scriptwriting & Creative Execution

•   	Writing compelling, high-converting direct-response scripts designed to hook cold US audiences and drive them to purchase (and potentially work in tandem with a dedicated copywriter)

•   	Producing clear, detailed briefs for editors and designers - tight enough that the execution team can move fast without ambiguity

•   	Owning the creative pipeline for your assigned brands: research ? ideation ? scripting ? post-launch performance analysis and iteration

•   	Writing across formats: UGC-style scripts, direct-address video ads, static ad copy, and image concept briefs with the same conversion logic applied to each



Collaboration & Iteration

•   	Working closely with the Lead Strategist at the strategic level and with editors and designers at the execution level

•   	Leveraging proven copy structures, frameworks, and past winners to accelerate testing velocity

•   	Feeding insights back to the wider team to continuously improve our creative playbook



Performance Analysis & Scaling

•   	Analyzing winners and losers weekly - documenting what worked, why it worked, and what to test next

•   	Rapidly iterating winning concepts into multiple variations to validate and scale

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	Proven direct-response experience > you've written scripts, hooks, or ad concepts that have run on Meta or TikTok (paid socials)

•   	Strong copywriting skills across video and static formats > your writing pulls people in and keeps them moving toward a purchase

•   	Deep understanding of consumer psychology, awareness stages, and what makes cold traffic convert in the  target market

•   	Obsessive researcher > you go beyond surface-level competitive intel and find angles other people miss

•   	High output capacity, averaging 15–20 concepts a week, is the expectation, not the ceiling, and you can sustain it without the quality slipping



Instant No's

•   	You don't have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting

•   	You want to spend weeks polishing one campaign > this role requires speed, iteration, and high-quality output simultaneously

•   	You struggle with volume, operational workflows, or fast feedback cycles

•   	You're uncomfortable with the reality that most ads fail before one wins > failure is data, not a problem

•   	You're balancing multiple jobs or clients > this requires full-time, dedicated ownership

 

What Success Looks Like

•   	Consistently producing 15–20 net-new concepts per week across video and image formats

•   	Achieving a 10%+ creative hit rate -concepts that validate, scale, and drive real spend

•   	Operating as a reliable creative partner to the editors, designers, and lead strategists around you

 

Why Join Us

•   	Hands-on experience working on 7–8 figure brands with real paid media budgets behind them

•   	Performance-based upside - base + commissions tied directly to winners and scaling impact

•   	High ownership - your concepts directly influence spend, revenue, and growth

•   	Rapid learning environment with proven frameworks, strong feedback loops, and high iteration cadence

•   	Clear growth path to Lead Strategist or larger brand scope as you prove your output

 

???? If you don't have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting, please do not apply. If you do and you're ready to operate at volume in one of the most competitive DTC markets in the world, we'd like to hear from you.



Hiring Process

1. Fill out form: 

2. Once screened, you'll do skills assessment test

3. Interview

title: DTC Copywriter - Landing Pages & Brand Copy
description:
Fill out form to apply: 



3-5 years experience required



About Us



We're a DTC e-commerce brand building in the pheromone fragrance and skincare space, selling across the US, and globally. We run paid social at scale and drive traffic into funnels that need to do the heavy lifting- converting cold audiences into buyers without a salesperson in the room.



Our creative engine is strong. Our ads are performing. Now we need copy that meets that standard at every step of the funnel from the first headline on a prelander to the final paragraph on a product page.

This isn't a content marketing role. We don't need blog posts or captions. We need someone who writes copy that sells.

 

The Role



You'll be our dedicated copywriter for landing pages, website pages, and brand copy across our product portfolio. Your primary focus is the funnel: prelanders, product detail pages, bundle pages, and any web-facing copy that sits between a customer and a purchase decision.



Beyond the core funnel, you'll also support us with branding copy as needed things like brand positioning documents, product descriptions,
 sequences, and internal-facing documents that represent the brand voice externally.

You'll work closely with the entire Marketing Tribe – our CEO, Head of CRO, Head of Retention,  Head of Marketing and our Web Designer, and you'll be embedded in our creative feedback loop which means your copy gets tested, measured, and iterated on.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Core - Landing Page & Funnel Copy

•   	Writing and iterating on prelander copy across multiple brands and target market audience

•   	Writing product page copy (headlines, benefit blocks, objection-handling sections, CTAs) that is designed to convert, not just describe

•   	Developing copy variations for A/B tests in collaboration with the CRO lead

•   	Ensuring copy aligns with the ad creative, driving traffic, the message match from ad to page is your responsibility and so on.

•   	Rewriting or refreshing underperforming pages based on test results and performance data

•   	Writing & adapting tone and angle to the relevant audience without losing brand voice ensuring everything is congruent with the angle we are going for



Secondary - Brand & Website Copy

•   	Writing and maintaining product descriptions across the Goda website and internal brand portfolio as needed

•   	Supporting brand positioning and messaging documents when new products or campaigns are in development

•   	Writing copy for bundle pages, offer pages, and promotional campaigns

•   	Assisting with brand copy assets on an as-needed basis - things like FAQ sections, guarantee copy, and trust-building content blocks

•   	Occasionally supporting internal brand documents where external-facing language needs to be polished and on-brand

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	A strong portfolio of conversion-focused copy - we want to see landing pages and web copy, not articles or social posts

•   	Deep understanding of buyer psychology: desire, objection, urgency, trust and how to write to each stage of awareness

•   	Ability to write clean, direct, persuasive copy without over-explaining or over-writing

•   	Experience writing for DTC or direct-response brands,  you know what a hook is, what a benefit statement is, and why most copy buries the lede

•   	Ability to adapt tone across brands & you can write differently for each product without losing the underlying conversion logic

•   	Willingness to have your copy tested and to iterate based on what the data shows, not just what you think sounds good

•   	Reliable output & you can deliver multiple page drafts per week and respond to feedback without needing hand-holding



Strong Advantages

•   	Experience writing for beauty, wellness, or lifestyle DTC brands

•   	Understanding of how ad creative and landing page copy should work together

•   	Ability to write for both English-language markets with awareness of cultural differences in buyer psychology

•   	Some understanding of CRO principles even if you're not running tests yourself, you know what makes a page structure work



Instant No's

•   	You write for brand awareness, not conversion, if your instinct is to make things sound nice rather than make people buy, this isn't the role

•   	You can't take feedback, every piece of copy gets reviewed and iterated, and defensiveness will slow the whole team down

•   	You've never written a landing page or sales page - we need immediate contribution, not someone learning the format on the job

•   	You write in a vacuum, this role requires close collaboration with designers, strategists, and the CRO lead

 

What the First 90 Days Look Like



First 30 Days

•   	Complete onboarding: brand immersion, customer avatar deep-dive, & SOPs

•   	Study existing prelanders and product pages across all brands, understand what's working and where the gaps are

•   	Produce your first set of prelander copy drafts and receive feedback

•   	Establish your working rhythm: turnaround times, revision process, communication norms

60 Days

•   	Delivering copy with minimal revision rounds, you've internalized the brand voice and the conversion framework

•   	Contributing actively to A/B test ideation, bringing copy angles and hypotheses, not just executing briefs

•   	Supporting the Web Designer with page copy that integrates with the visual structure, not just dropped in as an afterthought

•   	Beginning to take on secondary copy needs: product descriptions, offer pages, brand copy requests

90 Days

•   	A trusted, go-to copywriter for anything web-facing-  the team isn't second-guessing your output

•   	Independently developing new copy angles and testing hypotheses based on performance data

•   	Contributing to conversion rate improvement in a measurable, documented way

•   	Reliable at volume & multiple high-quality deliverables per week without quality dropping

 

How We Measure Your Performance

•   	Conversion rate on the pages you write - this is the primary metric

•   	A/B test contribution: how many tests your copy informs and what the results show

•   	Turnaround speed and revision count - fewer rounds is better



Compensation & Benefits

•   	Competitive monthly rate (contractor) to be discussed based on experience

•   	Fully remote - no office, no fixed timezone

•   	Learning & development budget

•   	Access to winning ad and landing page references across our brand portfolio

•   	Clear growth path as the team and brand portfolio expands

•   	Weekly performance reviews and tight feedback loops with senior tea
mbers

•   	Exposure to multi-market DTC operations across US and Southeast Asia

 

???? This is a role for someone who takes copy seriously as a commercial discipline. If you've ever rewritten a headline and watched the numbers move, and wanted to do more of that, you'll fit right in here!



Fill out form to apply:

title: Social Media Manager (DTC Strategy) - Ecommerce
description:
Please Apply here: 



You must have conversion experience - not just scheduling contents



About Us



We're a fast-scaling e-commerce company operating portfolios of 7-8 figure DTC brands across the US, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Our brands are built in high-affinity consumer categories, and we run paid social at serious volume, which means our organic social presence needs to work just as hard.



We're not building social media accounts for vanity. We're building communities that create trust, drive consideration, and keep customers coming back. If you understand the difference between content that looks good and content that actually builds a brand, you're who we're looking for.

 

The Role



We're hiring Social Media Managers to own and grow the social presence of our brands across assigned markets. Each hire will be dedicated to a specific market: US, Philippines, and Malaysia, and will be responsible for managing the day-to-day social operations of the brands within that region.



This is not just a scheduling role. You'll be expected to understand the audience, develop content strategy, manage the community where possible, and work closely with our creative and marketing teams to make sure social is pulling its weight in the overall brand ecosystem.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Content & Channel Management

•   	Owning the social media calendar and posting schedule across assigned platforms (primarily Instagram, TikTok, and
) for your market

•   	Developing and executing a content strategy that fits your market's audience- culturally relevant, platform-native, and on-brand

•   	Writing captions and social copy that reflects the brand voice while resonating with a local audience

•   	Coordinating with the creative team to brief, review, and publish visual and video content on time

•   	Staying on top of trends, formats, and platform updates relevant to your market and knowing when to use them and when to ignore them



Community & Engagement

•   	Managing comments, DMs, and mentions across all social platforms – where possible,

•   	Identifying high-value engagement opportunities - UGC reposts, brand advocates, community 
nts and acting on them

•   	Maintaining a consistent, human brand voice across every public interaction



Performance & Reporting

•   	Tracking key social metrics, such as reach, engagement, follower growth, saves, shares and reporting on them regularly

•   	Identifying what's working and what's not, and adjusting the strategy accordingly

•   	Feeding insights back to the creative and marketing teams - if something is performing organically, that's signal worth acting on

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	Proven experience managing social media for a brand not just personal accounts or one-off projects

•   	Deep understanding of your assigned market: the culture, the platforms people actually use, how they talk, what they respond to

•   	Strong written communication skills you write captions that sound like a real person, not a brand template

•   	Platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, and
 you know how each one works and what content performs best where

•   	Ability to manage multiple accounts and a content calendar without dropping the ball

•   	Comfortable working independently and managing your own priorities day-to-day



Strong Advantages

•   	Experience working with DTC, beauty, wellness, or lifestyle brands

•   	Understanding of how organic social and paid media work together in a brand funnel

•   	Basic video editing or content creation skills  the ability to put together a simple story or reel without always needing a designer

•   	For PH/MY markets: native or near-native fluency in Filipino or Bahasa Malaysia in addition to English

Instant No's

•   	You think social media management is just about posting consistently - engagement strategy, community tone, and content quality matter just as much

•   	You can't take feedback or adapt quickly, content strategies evolve fast and this team moves at pace

•   	You treat every platform the same

•   	You're not proactive - if you need to be told what to post every day, this isn't the right fit



How We Measure Your Performance

•   	Engagement rate and community growth across managed accounts

•   	Content output consistency and adherence to the publishing schedule

•   	Quality of insights and strategic recommendations surfaced from performance data

•   	Cross-functional reliability how well you work with creative, marketing, and CS teams



Compensation & Benefits

•   	Competitive salary - based on experience and market

•   	Clear growth path: Social Media Manager ? Social Media Team Lead

•   	Fully remote work from anywhere within your market's timezone

•   	Learning & development budget

•   	Access to premium social media and creative tools

•   	Exposure to a multi-brand, multi-market DTC operation at real scale

•   	Collaborative team environment with strong creative and marketing support

•   	Weekly check-ins and regular performance feedback to keep you growing

 

???? We're hiring for three markets - the Philippines, Malaysia, and United States. Please specify which market you're applying for when you reach out.

title: Copywriter
description:
We are a New Zealand-based company with a global client base. We are looking for an exceptional copywriter who can produce sophisticated, research-backed, long-form and short-form content across a wide range of industries. Our work spans SEO-driven articles, technical deep dives, thought leadership, PR-focused content, and brand website copy.



The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker who writes with clarity, authority, and nuance. We are keen to work with someone who understands how to translate complex information into compelling and engaging content after doing comprehensive research on required topics, and has a strong attention to detail. 



Long-Form Content & SEO

- Write in-depth SEO articles (1,500–3,000+ words) optimized around keyword intent, search psychology, and structured readability.

- Create expert-level content across a variety of verticals, including technology, education, AI, HR/payroll, engineering, beauty science, wellness, hospitality, and more.

- Develop high-quality guest posts and editorial pieces suitable for authoritative publications.



Brand & Website Copy

- Produce persuasive landing pages, service descriptions, and product messaging across B2B and B2C brands.

title: Marketing Specialist
description:
Beyond Tech Media is a global digital marketing agency working across SEO, content strategy, brand storytelling, and AI-driven marketing. We are known for producing high-quality, data-backed, and deeply engaging content for diverse audiences across platforms. We’re looking for a Marketing Specialist who blends creativity, research skills, and AI fluency to create standout content for our brand.



This role is ideal for someone who is both creative and strategic, someone who can brainstorm, research, write, design, and execute content across platforms while maintaining a consistent brand voice.



You should be comfortable using AI tools to streamline workflows, enhance design, plan content calendars, and create visuals with micro animations that elevate brand storytelling.



Key Responsibilities

- Content Creation

- Write high-quality, SEO-aware blogs for the Beyond Tech Media website.

- Create engaging Instagram content (carousels, captions, reels concepts, micro-animations).

- Develop engaging
 content 
 for reach, shares, and community engagement.

- Produce professional, value-driven LinkedIn posts for the company page.



Research & Strategy

- Conduct thorough research on marketing trends, AI in business, SEO, industry insights, and competitor activity.

- Build structured content calendars across platforms based on insights and brand positioning.

- AI-Driven Execution



Use AI tools effectively for, while carefully reviewing it with a meticulous human lens: 

- content planning and ideation

- caption and blog draft generation

- visual design

- layout creation

- micro-animations and lightweight motion graphics

- Stay updated on emerging AI tools to enhance productivity and creative quality.



Visuals & Micro-Animations



- Create clean, modern, and engaging visual assets for social media.

- Produce subtle micro-animations or motion elements to elevate brand storytelling.



Preferred (Not Mandatory) Skills



- Ability to write YouTube scripts that reflect brand voice, positioning, and thought leadership.

- Light video editing for YouTube content (basic cuts, captions, transitions).

- Ghostwriting for leadership on LinkedIn:  able to capture tone, insights, and storytelling style.



Who You Are



- A creative marketer with a strong understanding of digital platforms.

- Someone who can switch between research-heavy content and short-form social content.

- Highly organised, proactive, and comfortable working autonomously.

- Strong written English and a natural feel for persuasive, engaging storytelling.

- Curious about AI and able to integrate it intelligently into your workflow.

- Comfortable juggling multiple content formats and deadlines.



What We Offer



- Opportunity to help shape and grow the Beyond Tech Media brand.

- A collaborative, high-performance environment with clear direction.

- Exposure to global markets and leading-edge marketing trends.

- Flexibility and creative freedom with long-term growth potential.



Please send:



- Your portfolio or examples of social posts, blogs, visuals, or micro-animations.

- A short note about your background and interest in this role.

title: SEO Outreach & Copywrighting Specialist
description:
We're a New Zealand-based company seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Backlink Outreach and Copywriting Specialist to develop and execute effective link-building strategies and write excellent content. You will be responsible for identifying relevant websites, crafting compelling outreach
s, and building strong relationships to acquire valuable backlinks. Equally, you will be responsible for writing articles, which will require comprehensive research, using detailed prompts and editing to a high standard. This role is crucial in improving the website's search engine rankings and driving organic traffic.



Above all, we are keen to work with someone who is attentive, detail-oriented, a quick learner, and follows instructions carefully.



Responsibilities:



- Develop and implement link-building strategies: Create and execute comprehensive backlink acquisition campaigns aligned with our SEO goals.

- Identify and qualify target websites: Research and identify relevant websites, blogs, and influencers within our industry.

- Conduct thorough website analysis: Evaluate potential link opportunities based on domain authority, relevance, and traffic.

- Craft compelling outreach
s: Write personalised and engaging outreach
s to secure backlinks and guest posting opportunities.

- Build and maintain relationships: Develop and nurture relationships with website owners, bloggers, and influencers.

- Manage and track outreach campaigns: Monitor campaign performance, track results, and report on key metrics.

- Stay up-to-date with SEO trends: Keep abreast of the latest SEO best practices and link-building techniques.

- Utilize SEO tools: Employ SEO tools to analyse backlinks and identify opportunities.

- Manage and organise link information: maintain accurate records of outreach efforts, links acquired, and contact information.

- Collaborate with the content team: work with the content team to identify content opportunities and ensure content is optimized for backlink acquisition.

- Work with AI tools effectively and engage in comprehensive research along with editing and proofreading of articles



Qualifications:



- Proven experience in backlink outreach and link building.

- Strong understanding of SEO principles and link-building best practices.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to conduct in-depth website and competitor analysis.

- Proficiency in using SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, etc.

- Strong organisational and time management skills.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Ability to build and maintain relationships with website owners and influencers.

- A proactive and results-orientated mindset.

- Bachelor's degree in marketing, communications, or a related field (preferred).



Note:

1. We value loyalty and don't want to work with people who like to engage in job hopping in short time spans. We want to hire, train, and retain talent that values long-term relationships and wants to grow with us. If you're after a short-term gig, please don't apply. Candidates who have a history of bulk applying for jobs or quickly jumping between jobs will be rejected. 

2. We use Time Doctor as a tracking tool.

3. The working hours are 9am to 5pm, Philippines time, while being fully remote. 

4. You need a stable high speed internet connection and your own device.



If you're serious about the role, respond with a message saying, "I acknowledge this position is a full-time, long-term role. I will be working exclusively with one employer, will not engage in job hopping or moonlighting, and I understand time tracking tools are used in this role."



In your message, highlight why you think you are a good fit for this role and demonstrate how you meet the requirements. You will be assigned a task if you are shortlisted for the role.

title: Digital PR Publicist
description:
We are a fast-growing New Zealand based digital marketing agency that partners with global brands to deliver data-driven results. We specialise in SEO, content marketing and PR campaigns that build authority, visibility, and engagement. We are seeking a talented and creative digital PR publicist who can lead our dynamic team and help secure high-authority media coverage and editorial backlinks.



As a Digital PR Publicist, you’ll be responsible for crafting compelling digital PR campaigns that earn top-tier media coverage, drive high-quality backlinks, and amplify our clients' online presence. You will ideate story angles, build media lists, pitch to journalists, and track coverage across industries such as tech, beauty, health, finance, and lifestyle.



Key Responsibilities

Digital PR Campaign Creation

Plan and execute creative, newsworthy campaigns designed to attract media attention and high-authority links.



Media Outreach & Relationship Building

Proactively pitch stories to journalists, editors, bloggers, and influencers. Build and nurture long-term relationships with media contacts.



Storytelling & Content Creation

Create press releases, media kits, data-led stories, thought leadership articles, and newsjacking content to tie into trending topics.



Media List Development

You'll have access to top media database and monitoring tools such as Muck Rack, as well as access to LinkedIn Sales Navigator contact lists/ 



Performance Reporting

Track PR campaign results including media placements, backlink acquisition, domain authority of publications, referral traffic, and brand mentions.



Collaboration

Work closely with SEO, content, and social media teams to align messaging and maximize the reach of digital campaigns.

title: Tech Operations and Automation Manager ($1,500–$2,000/month)
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

 triggers)

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Packaging Designer (E-commerce | Consumer Products)
description:
Full Time | US EST Hours



Are you experienced in designing packaging for physical products—not just digital graphics?



We’re looking for a Packaging Designer who can create clean, functional, and production-ready packaging for consumer products sold online.



What You’ll Do

• Design packaging for products (boxes, inserts, labels, manuals)

• Create print-ready files based on dielines and manufacturer specs

• Ensure packaging is clear, functional, and aligned with brand standards

• Optimize packaging for e-commerce (clarity, icons, callouts)

• Collaborate with operations and suppliers on packaging adjustments

• Maintain consistency across product lines and SKUs

• Support new product launches and packaging updates





What We’re Looking For

• 3+ years experience in packaging design (consumer products or e-commerce)

• Strong understanding of dielines, print production, and packaging structures

• Experience designing for physical products (not just digital assets)

• Skilled in Adobe Illustrator (required)

• Strong attention to detail and ownership of work

• Able to design with clarity (not overly decorative)



Nice to Have

• Experience with kitchenware, home goods, or similar products

• Familiarity with Amazon or DTC packaging

• Understanding of cost-efficient packaging design



To apply, please send your RESUME and PORTFOLIO, as well as answers to the questions below. 



1. Describe one packaging project you worked on for a physical product. What was the product, and what was your role in the design process?

2. When working with dielines and print files, what are the key things you check before sending a design to production?

3. How do you approach designing packaging that is both visually appealing and functional (e.g., protects the product, communicates clearly, and meets production requirements)?

4. Have you ever had to revise a packaging design due to manufacturing or cost constraints? What changes did you make and why?

5. What tools and software do you use for packaging design, and how do you typically prepare files for print (e.g., color mode, bleed, file setup)?

title: YouTube Publishing & Thumbnail Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
About the Role



I am looking for a detail-oriented and creative YouTube Publishing & Thumbnail Assistant to support my growing YouTube channel, The Balloon Boutique Studio.



This role focuses on video optimization, packaging, and publishing—ensuring each video is positioned to attract clicks and perform well.



You will be responsible for how the content is presented, not editing the video itself.



This is a part-time, ongoing role with consistent weekly work and the opportunity to grow with the brand. Opportunity for increased hours and pay based on performance.

Scheduling tools


 / Zapier

title: URGENT HIRING: Social Media Manager (Viral Content & Growth)
description:
We’re looking for a social media native to help manage and scale accounts that generate millions of views every month.



This isn’t a basic “schedule posts and log off” role. It’s for someone who genuinely understands the internet — someone who notices trends early, understands why content performs, and enjoys turning good posts into great ones that reach massive audiences.



If you’re the type of person who scrolls social media and naturally analyzes why something went viral, you’ll feel right at home here.



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants real experience managing high-performing social media accounts, learning viral content strategy, and building a long-term career in the social media and creator economy.



What You’ll Be Doing:



You’ll help manage and optimize multiple social media pages by posting content, monitoring performance, and making smart decisions based on trends and engagement.



Your work will involve researching short-form content trends, reviewing how posts perform, spotting opportunities to improve results, and applying feedback to help our pages continue growing.



You’ll also learn our internal workflows and strategies that help our content consistently reach large audiences.





We’re looking for someone who is:



• Highly reliable and organized

• Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

• Detail-oriented with strong visual judgment

• Naturally curious about why content goes viral

• Familiar with social media trends, formats, and internet culture

• Fluent in English and able to communicate clearly

• Open to feedback and eager to improve



Gen Z applicants or those deeply familiar with Gen Z internet culture are strongly encouraged to apply, but this is not a requirement.



Experience is helpful, but passion, instincts, and work ethic matter more than formal background.



Why This Role Is a Great Opportunity



• Fully remote work

• Paid training and ongoing mentorship

• Performance-based bonuses

• Work on social media accounts that reach millions of views

• Clear path for growth into higher-level social media or strategy roles

• Supportive team environment with no micromanagement



How to Apply



Please submit the following:



1?? A portfolio or examples of content you’ve worked on (personal projects are welcome)

2?? A 1–2 minute video introduction explaining why you’d be a great fit



Your
 subject line should be: SUPERSTAR SMM



!!!! Important !!!!

• No video introduction = automatic rejection

• Incorrect subject line = automatic rejection



We’re looking for people who bring creativity, curiosity, and strong work ethic — not copy-paste applications.



If social media is something you genuinely enjoy and want to turn into a long-term career, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Creative Director
description:
Full-Time | 42 hours for 6 days a week | $1500 up to $2000



We’re looking for someone who is chronically online in the best way possible.



The type of person who:



• Saves TikToks and Reels constantly

• Knows when a video is about to go viral

• Understands trends before they become trends

• Thinks about content ideas while scrolling



If social media feels less like work and more like second nature, keep reading.



This role is for someone who wants to turn their love for content into a real career.



You’ll be helping create high-performing short-form videos and visuals designed to reach millions of viewers across social media platforms.



This isn’t just an editing job. You’ll also help shape the creative direction of content — spotting trends, improving ideas, and helping posts perform better.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- You’ll work with our social media team to create engaging short-form content for platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Your responsibilities will include editing videos, working with images, improving visuals, and helping guide the creative direction of posts so they perform better online.

- You’ll also help identify trends, analyze content performance, and contribute ideas that help our social media pages grow.



This Role Is Perfect For Someone Who:



• Is always on social media and understands internet culture

• Loves creating or editing short-form videos

• Naturally notices what makes content go viral

• Has strong English communication skills

• Has a good eye for visuals, aesthetics, and storytelling

• Is reliable, hardworking, and takes responsibility for their work

• Wants to grow their skills in social media and content creation



Experience editing short-form videos is important. Experience in creative direction is a bonus, but not required.



What matters most is that you’re creative, curious, and eager to learn.



Why This Is a Great Opportunity:



• Fully remote work

• Paid training

• Long-term position with growth opportunities

• No micromanagement

• Work on content seen by large audiences

• Opportunities for promotion and salary increases based on performance



To apply, please send:

1. A 1-minute video introduction telling us about yourself and why you'd be a good fit

2. A link to your creative portfolio 



NOTE: Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed!



We’re looking for people who bring creativity, personality, and strong work ethic — not generic applications.



If you’re passionate about social media and want to turn that passion into a career, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Customer Service Representative (CSR) –  (Remote)
description:
About the Role

Yess Boss Plumbing Inc. is seeking a reliable, fluent English-speaking Customer Service Representative (CSR) to join our remote answering service team. As the first point of contact for homeowners, you’ll play a key role in booking service appointments, responding to inquiries, and delivering a professional and supportive customer experience.



This role is ideal for someone who is customer-focused, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced, cloud-based environment. Plumbing experience is a plus but not required — we’ll provide training for the right person with a strong work ethic and a passion for helping others.

Work Schedule

• Full-Time: Wednesday  to  Sunday

• Shift: 5pm – 2:00am EST (Toronto, Canada time) which is 5am-2pm Philippine Time (PHT)

• Answer all inbound calls promptly within three rings using a professional and friendly tone.

• Gather complete customer information including: full name, contact numbers,
, full address (with unit number), issue description, and availability.

• Schedule plumbing appointments in the appropriate service window: Evening (6PM–8PM), Night (8PM–10PM) or 10pm-12am.

• Assign the most suitable technician based on availability, expertise, and proximity.

• Clearly communicate appointment details to the customer, including technician name and arrival expectations.

• Log all jobs and customer interactions in FieldPulse CRM accurately and in real time.

• Return all missed or dropped calls immediately and follow up on leads from Google ads, HomeDepot, Bark, and HomeStars.

• Follow company scripts and protocols for call handling, booking, and complaints.

• Build rapport and trust with each caller through empathy and active listening.

• Make follow-up calls within 24–48 hours of service completion to confirm satisfaction and request an online review.

• Document all feedback and escalate any concerns. Use insights for service improvements.

• Submit daily reports by 2:00 AM including calls handled, jobs booked, follow-ups completed, and any flagged issues.

• Attend weekly Monday safety meetings and ongoing training in technical skills, customer service, and software tools.

• Complete initial 1-week training and participate in performance reviews every 6 months.

Required Qualifications & Skills

• Fluent in English (spoken and written); French is an asset but not required.

• Excellent verbal communication and phone etiquette.

• Strong problem-solving, active listening, and multitasking skills.

• Organized, proactive, and dependable in a remote work setup.

• Preferred: experience in customer service, call centers, or remote admin support.

• Bonus: experience using FieldPulse CRM or similar platforms (training provided).

• High-speed, stable internet connection is a must (minimum 25 Mbps recommended).

• Quiet and professional home office setup.

• High school diploma or equivalent.

Technical Requirements

• Reliable laptop or desktop computer.

• Noise-cancelling headset.

• Backup power source (preferred but not required).

About Yess Boss Plumbing Inc.

Yess Boss Plumbing Inc. is a dynamic, fast-growing plumbing company based in Ontario, Canada. We’re known for our professionalism, customer-first service, and commitment to quality. We believe in empowering our team with clear processes, strong support, and a positive remote work culture.

How to Apply

Please submit the following:

1. Your updated resume (PDF preferred)

2. A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and sharing your customer service or VA experience

3. A brief message explaining why you're a great fit for Yess Boss Plumbing Inc.

4. Include the word "Green Elephant" as the subject line of your application before submitting the application.

We thank all applicants for their interest, but only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Top Vancouver Real Estate Team Hiring Experienced Virtual Transaction Coordinator Canadian Experience Required, Long-Ter
description:
Experienced Virtual Transaction Coordinator for Top Vancouver Real Estate Team

Canadian Real Estate Experience Required



We are a top-producing real estate team based in Vancouver, BC, and we are looking for an exceptional Virtual Transaction Coordinator to join our team full-time.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is highly organized, detail-driven, proactive, and confident managing real estate files from listing to closing. You will play a key role in keeping our transactions accurate, compliant, on schedule, and running smoothly so our agents can stay focused on serving clients and generating business.



We are not looking for a general virtual assistant.

We are looking for a true transaction coordinator who understands the pace, professionalism, and precision required in real estate.



Who This Role Is Perfect For



This role is ideal for someone who already has experience supporting a Canadian real estate team or brokerage and can step into the position with minimal hand-holding.



You take ownership.

You follow through.

You catch details others miss.

You communicate clearly and professionally.

You know how to keep files clean, timelines tight, and deals moving.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Coordinating real estate transactions from signed listing or accepted offer through completion



Preparing, organizing, and managing contracts, disclosures, and transaction documents



Ensuring files are complete, accurate, and compliant



Tracking key dates including deposits, subject removals, completion, possession, and other important deadlines



Communicating with agents, clients, lawyers, conveyancers, inspectors, and cooperating agents



Uploading, organizing, and maintaining documents in Skyslope, Google Drive, and related systems



Assisting with listing paperwork and MLS-related coordination



Scheduling inspections, appointments, and transaction-related follow-up



Following checklists and systems to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Proactively flagging missing documents, deadlines, or issues before they become problems



Required Experience



Minimum 2 years of experience in real estate transaction coordination, real estate administration, or a similar role



Canadian real estate experience is required



Strong understanding of the Canadian real estate transaction process



Experience handling contracts, disclosures, compliance documents, and transaction timelines



Excellent written and spoken English



Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple files at once



High attention to detail and accuracy



Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup



Available to work Monday to Friday during Vancouver business hours



Strong Preference Will Be Given To Candidates With



Experience supporting a BC real estate team or brokerage



Familiarity with BC real estate paperwork and timelines



Experience using Skyslope, Paragon, Touchbase, Follow Up Boss, Sisu, and Google Drive



Knowledge of the Vancouver real estate market



Compensation and Schedule



Full-time remote role



40 hours per week



Monday to Friday, aligned with Vancouver time



CAD $8 per hour



Long-term opportunity with room to grow for the right person



Why Join Our Team



You will be joining a top-producing Vancouver real estate team



You will be part of a fast-paced, professional, and growth-oriented environment



Your work will matter and be valued



We believe in strong systems, high standards, and long-term relationships



This is an opportunity for someone who wants stability, growth, and to be part of a winning team



How to Apply



Please use this subject line:



Rockstar TC for Vancouver, [Your Name]



Please include all of the following in your application:



Your resume



A short introduction about yourself



How many years of Canadian real estate experience you have



Which province you worked in



Which brokerage or real estate team you supported



Which real estate systems and tools you have used



A short example of one transaction you helped coordinate from contract to completion



Your availability in Vancouver time



Important



Please apply only if you have prior Canadian real estate transaction coordination or real estate administration experience.



Qualified applicants may be asked to complete a short skills test to evaluate transaction coordination, file organization, and deadline management.



We are looking for someone who is sharp, reliable, professional, and ready to become an important part of a high-performing team.



If that is you, we would love to hear from you.

Skills

title: Assistant Project Coordinator + Support
description:
We’re a growing construction company looking for someone who truly enjoys what they do; someone who takes pride in their work, stays engaged, and wants to be part of a team that’s building something meaningful.



We are looking to hire immediately, so this is a great opportunity for someone ready to step in, contribute, and grow with us.



This isn’t just a task-based role. You’ll be working closely with our Project Coordinator and leadership team, supporting real projects, helping things move forward, and becoming a valued part of our day-to-day flow.



Work Schedule:



Full-time, aligned with U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST)

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST



What You’ll Be Doing:



Supporting project coordination and daily operations

Assisting with estimates and scope preparation

Creating and adjusting floor plans using AutoCAD (small residential projects)

Keeping documents, timelines, and tasks organized and on track

Communicating with the team to keep everything aligned

Stepping in where needed to help projects move smoothly



What We’re Looking For:



Experience in construction coordination or a similar role

Confidence using AutoCAD and creating residential floor plans

Strong organization and attention to detail

Clear and consistent communication

Someone proactive, dependable, and solution-oriented

Someone who is fully present in their work and not spread across multiple full-time roles



Our Team Culture:

We believe in showing up for each other. We hold a high standard, and we push each other to grow—not in a harsh way, but in a way that builds trust, confidence, and real progress.



Everyone on our team has a voice. We value people who take ownership, communicate openly, and care about the work they’re doing. There’s a strong sense of support here, but also accountability—we’re all moving toward something bigger together.



If you’re someone who enjoys being part of a team, takes pride in doing things right, and wants to grow with a company that’s evolving, we’d love to connect.



To Apply:

Please submit your resume, a few samples of your AutoCAD/floor plan work, and a short introduction through our website.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT | EA TO THE CEO
description:
EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT | EA TO THE CEO

Storytime PODs | Remote | Full-Time

PHP 50,000 – 80,000 per month (approx. USD $5.50 – $8.00/hr)



WHY JOIN STORYTIME PODs?

Storytime PODs is an Australian company on a mission to bring joy and education to children worldwide through multilingual digital books and award-winning educational products. We've been operating for over 10 years and are growing rapidly into global markets, including the US, Canada, Australia, the UK, the Middle East and Asia.



Our team of 25 includes 17 tea
mbers based in the Philippines, and we're proud of the culture we've built together. We offer a stable, collaborative environment where people stay, grow, and thrive.



What you can expect:

- Weekly company huddles and daily team check-ins so you're always connected

- Paid official Philippine public holidays

- Some flexible hours arranged on a case-by-case basis

- A supportive and collaborative team environment

- High staff retention, our people stay because they enjoy what we do and how we do it

- Real career growth as the company expands globally



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for an experienced and proactive Executive Assistant to work directly with our CEO. This is a high-impact, varied role at the heart of the business - you'll be the CEO's right hand, helping manage communications, coordinate key activities, and use AI and automation tools to keep things running smoothly.



This is not a passive admin role. We want someone who takes initiative, communicates with confidence, and is excited about using modern tools, including AI, to work smarter.



Minimum 5 years of experience in a similar EA, operations, or business support role is required.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. CEO Inbox and Sales Support. Manage the CEO's
 inbox and handle inbound sales enquiries professionally and promptly

2. AI and Automation. Design and test automated workflows to support Sales and Finance activities using tools like 
 and Airtable

3. Supplier and Partner Calls. Make outbound calls to suppliers and partners as required, representing the CEO professionally. 

4. Events and Campaigns. Coordinate logistics for conferences, prepare sales collateral, and support marketing campaigns

5. Prospect Engagement. Respond to inbound prospects via
 and LinkedIn using AI tools, maintaining a consistent and compelling brand voice

6. Customer Support. Handle customer support activities, including collating feedback and tracking recommendations. 

7. Finance Support. Assist with invoicing, customer renewals, and basic financial reporting



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We want someone who brings:

- Minimum 5 years of experience in an EA, operations, or senior business support role

- Exceptional attention to detail - accuracy matters in everything you do

- Strong written English communication skills, especially for sales and client-facing correspondence

- Confident verbal communication skills for outbound calls to suppliers and partners

- A positive, can-do attitude - you find solutions, not problems

- Warm and approachable personality - you get on well with people at all levels

- Comfortable using AI tools, including Claude and ChatGPT, in day-to-day work

- Familiarity with automation concepts and tools such as Airtable and 



TOOLS WE USE

- Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive)

- Pipedrive (CRM)

- Mailchimp 
 marketing)

- Xero (finance and invoicing)

- 
 and Airtable (automation)

- Claude and ChatGPT (AI-assisted tasks)

- LinkedIn (prospect engagement)



ROLE DETAILS

- Type: Full-time, starting with a 6-month contract with high potential for permanent placement

- Location: Fully remote

- Salary: PHP 50,000 – 80,000 per month, depending on experience

- Hours: Flexible — arrangements discussed case-by-case

- Benefits: Paid Philippine official public holidays; additional benefits reviewed after 6 months



HOW TO APPLY

If you're organised, proactive, and excited about using AI and modern tools to support a fast-growing global business, we'd love to hear from you. Apply with your CV and a short note (3–5 sentences) on why this role is a great fit for you. Applications that do not include the word "sunshine" will not be reviewed.



We look forward to meeting you!



— The Storytime PODs Team

title: Legal Accounts Officer (Trust & Accounts Payable)
description:
About the Role



As the Accounts Officer, you will play a critical role in supporting the financial operations of our client’s growing firm. Working closely with the Finance Manager, you will manage day-to-day accounts payable activities, ensure accurate financial processing, and maintain the integrity of our financial records.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, enjoys working with numbers, and has experience in Australian law firm accounting. You will be the primary point of contact for accounts payable inquiries, manage transactional processing, and support month-end and audit-related tasks.



If you thrive in a structured environment, demonstrate strong problem-solving skills, and take pride in delivering accurate, high-quality work, we’d love to meet you!





Key Responsibilities

Accounts Payable Management:



Process all supplier invoices for general business expenses.

Manage and process matter-related EFT payment requests for both the office account and trust account.

Monitor, manage, and action all
s in the Accounts Payable shared inbox.

Act as the main contact for internal and external queries related to accounts payable.

Financial Processing & Reconciliation:



Code disbursements and trust transactions in the practice management system.

Complete daily bank reconciliations for payable and trust transactions.

Reconcile credit card expenses, including follow-ups with employees for receipt and expense verification.

Month-End & Audit Support



Assist with month-end accounts processes, including trust reporting.

Support audit requirements, variance analysis, and documentation preparation.

Contribute to timely completion of assigned month-end tasks.

General Finance Support:



Attend to finance-related queries from employees and clients in a timely manner.

Provide support to the Finance Manager on ad hoc tasks as required.

Maintain accurate financial records and contribute to continuous process improvement.



Other Responsibilities



Assist with audit preparation and documentation.

Ensure compliance with internal financial procedures and relevant regulations.

Contribute to a positive and collaborative team environment.

Take initiative in identifying efficiency improvements in finance workflows.



About You



Strong attention to detail with high standards for accuracy.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Highly organized with good time management and the ability to work autonomously.

Experience in an Australian law firm (required)

A positive attitude, willingness to learn, and a proactive approach.

Comfortable liaising with internal teams, clients, and external stakeholders.

Intermediate proficiency in Excel and the Microsoft Office suite (required).

Experience using Xero and legal practice management software (required).

Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a similar accounts or bookkeeping role within an Australian law firm (required).

A university degree is preferred but not essential.

title: CRM Specialist (Klaviyo Expert) – Full-Time | $307/week
description:
We’re hiring a CRM Specialist (Klaviyo-focused) to own and optimize our full customer lifecycle—from welcome flows to retention and winback.



This is a full-time, long-term role for someone who is both strategic and hands-on and experienced in retail eCommerce.



Role Details

Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (AEST)

Compensation: $307/week (paid weekly)



What You’ll Do

-Build and optimize lifecycle flows (Welcome, Post-Purchase, Winback)

-Manage and execute
 & SMS campaigns

-Segment audiences and personalize messaging

-Run A/B tests and continuously improve performance

-Track and optimize key metrics (CTR, LTV, conversions, retention)



Must-Haves

-3+ years experience in retail eCommerce CRM, lifecycle, or retention marketing

-Strong hands-on experience with Klaviyo (flows, campaigns, segmentation)

-Experience managing end-to-end campaigns and automations

-Strong understanding of lifecycle marketing strategy

Experience with:

Shopify

Google Sheets

Trello

OneNote

-Solid understanding of conversion and customer behavior

-Data-driven mindset with ability to analyze and act on performance metrics

-Strong communication, ownership, and problem-solving skills



Nice-to-Have

-Experience or understanding of Meta Ads

-Familiarity with Google Looker Studio

-Experience with loyalty or retention programs



To Apply

Please include:

-Your most updated CV

-A brief summary of your Klaviyo experience

-1–2 measurable results you’ve achieved (e.g., revenue, open rates, conversions)

-Example (or description) of a flow or campaign you’ve built



Applications without a CV will not be considered.

title: Customer Service Specialist – Strong Attention to Detail
description:
We are seeking a highly dependable and detail-oriented Customer Service with solid experience in fashion dropshipping. This is a long-term position for someone who can work independently, communicate effectively, and consistently deliver accurate, high-quality results. A major part of the role involves coordinating with suppliers, monitoring order fulfillment, and ensuring smooth end-to-end operations. Many customer replies will be supported by AI tools.



Key Responsibilities:

•Use internal spreadsheets and documents to manage daily workflows and maintain accurate operational records.

•Respond to HelpScout tickets promptly (expected output: 30–40 tickets per hour).

•Follow return policy procedures, including offering discounts, issuing refunds, and providing return instructions.

•Report damaged or incorrect items to suppliers (via 
 or CJ) and secure replacements or refunds.

•Coordinate closely with suppliers regarding shipment updates, replacements, cancellations, and all fulfillment-related concerns.

•Oversee order fulfillment, ensuring all unfulfilled Shopify orders are followed up, and resolve issues regarding size, color, inventory availability, and address verification.

•Proven experience with CJ Dropshipping is mandatory.

•Collaborate with both Customer Service and Supply Chain teams to keep operations running smoothly.



Qualifications required: 

•Proven experience in fashion dropshipping and supply chain/order fulfillment (applications without this will not be reviewed).

•Proven knowledge on the ins and outs in CJ Dropshipping in terms of order fulfillment.

•Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

•Experience with Zendesk, Gorgias, HelpScout, Shopify, and, add the word sky in the subject line, other customer service or fulfillment tools.

•Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple responsibilities independently.

•Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

•Comfortable giving feedback and proposing improvements to operational processes.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary + KPI-based bonuses

Long-term, work-from-home setup

Flexible schedule within agreed hours

Strong opportunities for career growth as the company expands



How to Apply:

-Your resume

-A cover letter detailing your fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment experience, and explaining why you are an ideal fit for this role.

-Provide a loom video [less than a minute] explaining how you organize your day

description:
