The educational content is in the domain of Math and English at the 7-12 (possibly 13-16) age-group. 



The position is part-time for a start to ascertain the right firt with the possibility of being a fulltime content creator with attractive partnership growth potential.



If you are interested, please send a Whatsapp Message to 
(Hendry) with your experience and share a short paragraph of why you think you are suitable. Put the title as "Social Media Video Content Creator". I would not be able to respond to other channels.

title: Part-Time Blog Editor - NYC Hip Hop Culture
description:
FiveBoroFlow is an NYC hip hop culture page covering rap lyrics, artist news, and street culture across all five boroughs.

We are looking for a part-time editor to review and polish 3-5 blog posts per week. Your job is to edit for tone, clarity, and authenticity while preserving NYC slang and rap culture voice. Do NOT sanitize the writing or make it sound corporate.

You should be familiar with artists like Jay-Z, Nas, Cardi B, Pop Smoke, Fivio Foreign, and Lil TJay. You do not need to be an expert on day one but you need to respect the culture and learn fast.

To apply send: a short intro, 3 NYC rappers you know well and why, your rate, and any samples if you have them. Shortlisted candidates will receive a paid test task.

title: Full–Time Virtual Assistant - Phone Support & Customer Service (US Clients)
description:
FULL-TIME VIRTUAL ASSISTANT – CUSTOMER SUPPORT, PHONE SUPPORT & LOGISTICS



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based company that buys unused diabetic supplies from customers nationwide. We are looking for a dedicated, highly responsive, full-time virtual assistant to help manage daily operations including phone support, customer service, shipping coordination, lead follow-ups, and logistics.



This role is phone-heavy, along with
 and messenger support. You will be responding to leads using Microsoft Outlook Webmail,
 Messenger, Google Voice, and OpenPhone (Quo), answering inbound customer calls, making outbound follow-up calls when needed, and assisting customers clearly and professionally.



Training will be provided, but you must remain attentive throughout your shift, respond quickly, and communicate clearly with U.S.-based customers at all times.



We are looking for long-term, career-minded applicants who want stable, full-time work. If you are just looking for the highest-paying job you can find this week, this role is not a good fit.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



Answer inbound customer phone calls professionally using Google Voice and OpenPhone (Quo)

Make outbound follow-up calls when needed

Speak confidently with customers and explain our process in fluent, easy-to-understand English

Check and respond to
s using Outlook Webmail (GoDaddy-hosted)

Create and send prepaid shipping labels using 

Prepare and coordinate shipping kits

Respond to
 messages and comments quickly

Quote customers using our internal price sheet

Track shipments and provide estimated delivery updates

Coordinate local meetups with our local liaison buyer (scheduling only)

Confirm customer payout method and amount and relay details to the payment manager

Stay attentive and responsive to phone calls,
s, and messages throughout the shift



REQUIREMENTS:



Excellent spoken English with clear pronunciation and natural grammar

Strong verbal communication skills and comfort speaking with U.S. customers on the phone

Excellent written English and professional communication skills

Previous tech or computer-related experience such as IT support, tech support, systems administration, or similar roles

Very detail-oriented and organized

Fast and reliable internet with a quiet, distraction-free environment for phone calls

Familiar with Google Voice, OpenPhone (Quo), Outlook, and 
 or able to learn quickly

Comfortable working with multiple browser-based software tools

Must be available during U.S. business hours and evenings/weekends as listed below

Experience in customer service, eCommerce, logistics, or phone-based support is a plus

Must consistently monitor and respond to calls,
s, and messages throughout the workday



ATTENTION TO DETAIL REQUIREMENT:



To confirm that you have read this job post carefully, please include the phrase “I pay attention to details – [Your Full Name]” as the subject line of your application message. Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.



TOOLS YOU’LL USE:



Microsoft Outlook (GoDaddy-hosted Webmail)

Google Voice (calls and SMS)

OpenPhone (Quo) (calls, SMS, call logging)



 Messenger

Google Sheets (for price quoting)



WORK HOURS:



Full-Time: 40 hours per week



Monday–Friday: 6:00 PM – 11:00 PM Eastern Time

Saturday: 3:00 PM – 10:00 PM Eastern Time

Sunday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM Eastern Time



This role requires consistent evening and weekend availability. Only apply if you can reliably work this schedule.



SALARY AND PAYMENT:



$6.47 per hour (increased rate due to evening and weekend schedule)

Paid weekly via Wise



TRIAL PERIOD:



All hires will start with a paid one-week trial period. Training during the trial period will take place Monday–Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time only.



After the trial period is completed and if selected to continue, work hours will revert back to the regular evening and weekend schedule listed above.



Only apply if you are able to work both the daytime training schedule and the long-term evening and weekend schedule.



PERKS AND BENEFITS:



13th-month pay

Performance-based bonuses

Annual salary reviews and increases based on performance

Training and long-term growth opportunities

Stable full-time work with a supportive U.S.-based company



HOW TO APPLY:



Please include:

A short one- to two-minute voice sample or audio recording introducing yourself and describing your past work experience so we can assess spoken English clarity, pronunciation, and confidence

Your time zone and daily availability

Your expected monthly salary in PHP

Any relevant experience with phone-based customer support, tech or computer-related roles, Google Voice or OpenPhone (Quo), Outlook, PirateShip, or
 messaging

A brief explanation of why you believe you are a great fit for this position and what you are looking for in a long-term remote role



FINAL ATTENTION TO DETAIL TEST:



Please submit a photo of a handwritten note that says “I can work the Day Shift – [Your Full Name]” along with today’s date. A simple phone photo is fine. Applications missing this step will not be considered.

title: Long-Form Editor Needed!
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



In short someone who can edit like this:


/watch?v=zIN5dGq5Wjs


/watch?v=D3lhrrXb4WI&t=92s



We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



- Taste



- Judgment



- Restraint



- Storytelling ability



PS. You should be able to handle basic color grading inside DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Nothing crazy…



But enough to make footage feel clean, consistent, and intentional.





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





If this feels obvious to you…



You’re probably who we’re looking for.



Send your portfolio.

title: Customer Support & Retention Specialist
description:
We're looking for a passionate and driven Customer Support & Retention Specialist to join our growing e-commerce team. This is a full-time, fully remote position. You'll be the frontline voice of our brand — resolving customer issues, building lasting relationships, and turning at-risk customers into loyal advocates. All communication is handled via
.



Available Shifts (Philippines Time)

We have two shifts available — please indicate your preferred shift when applying:

• Shift 1: 5:00 PM – 12:00 AM

• Shift 2: 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM



What You'll Do

• Manage a high volume of customer
 inquiries with professionalism and speed

• Proactively retain customers by identifying churn risks and offering tailored solutions

• Upsell and cross-sell products to existing customers where appropriate

• Resolve order issues, returns, refunds, and complaints with empathy and efficiency

• Maintain accurate records of customer interactions using CRM/helpdesk tools

• Meet or exceed KPIs including CSAT, retention rate, and response time

• Flag recurring issues and collaborate with the team to improve processes



Requirements

• Exceptional written English — grammar, tone, and clarity must be outstanding

• Minimum 2 years of customer support experience, preferably in e-commerce or retail

• Proven track record in customer retention or sales

• Comfortable using CRM and helpdesk platforms (e.g. Zendesk, Gorgias, Freshdesk, HubSpot)

• Strong problem-solving skills and a customer-first mindset

• Ability to work independently, manage time effectively, and meet deadlines

• Willing and able to work overnight shifts

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional work setup



Nice to Have

• Experience with Shopify or other e-commerce platforms

• Background in upselling, winback campaigns, or loyalty programs



What We Offer

• Full-time, stable remote position

• Competitive salary (based on experience)

• Performance bonuses tied to retention and sales KPIs

• Supportive team environment with room to grow

• [Add: paid leave, equipment allowance, etc.]

title: Financial Operations Analyst
description:
Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Financial Operations

*Manage full-cycle bookkeeping (A/R, A/P, general ledger, reconciliations)

*Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in QuickBooks 

*Process payroll and ensure accuracy of employee compensation records

*Manage invoicing, collections, and vendor payments

*Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

*Support tax preparation by maintaining organized financial documentation



Financial Reporting & Analysis

*Prepare and maintain weekly and monthly financial reports

*Build and manage Excel-based reports and dashboards to track performance

*Analyze variances in revenue, expenses, and key financial metrics

*Track KPIs and provide clear summaries of financial performance

*Assist leadership in understanding financial trends and business health



Data Integrity & Process Improvement

*Ensure accuracy and consistency across financial data and reporting systems

*Identify discrepancies and resolve issues proactively

*Improve reporting processes and streamline financial workflows

*Collaborate with leadership to improve visibility into financial performance



Required Experience & Skills

*3+ years of experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or financial operations is required

*Strong experience with QuickBooks is required.

*Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis) is required

*Experience managing A/R, A/P, payroll, and reconciliations is required

*Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy

*Ability to organize and present financial data clearly

*Experience with doing financial auditing is a huge plus

*Experience supporting US-based businesses is a plus





TECH REQUIREMENTS

Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed





Job Type: Full-time 

Schedule:   1PM-9PM  PST M-F / 4AM - 12 PM PHT Th-S

Salary Range: P60,000-80,000 monthly, Depending on experience



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 
 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.



Preferred Backgrounds  

Candidates with prior experience in the following sectors will be given priority consideration:



Government or public administration



Law firms or legal advisory institutions



Media or strategic communications organizations



Think tanks or research institutions



Consulting or public relations firms



Non-governmental or international organizations



Compensation and Benefits  

We offer competitive compensation packages and flexible work arrangements tailored to global professionals.



Application  

For inquiries or application submission, please contact us at:





Or visit our website:

title: Career Coach Executive Assistant and Social Media Manager
description:
If you've supported a US-based coach, speaker, or personal brand and you know how to turn half-finished content into polished LinkedIn posts that actually go live on time, this role was written for you.



The Opportunity

You will support the business owner directly, handling the tasks that keep the practice running day to day. This is not a traditional admin role. The owner uses custom ChatGPT prompts, Loom video training, and Google Docs to document every workflow so you are never left guessing. Execution, consistency, and proactive communication are what matter most here.



The owner is intentional about building this relationship over time. Start with clear, structured tasks, earn trust, and take on more autonomy as the partnership grows.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Resume and Docs (30%)

Rewrite and format resumes, cover letters, and LinkedIn profiles using Kolby's prompts and custom GPTs

Process and organize client intake documents, coaching notes, and speaking engagement materials



Social Media (30%)

Draft, schedule, and manage LinkedIn and social media content following Kolby's content calendar and brand voice

Project Management (25%)

Manage and organize tasks in Asana: daily prioritization, project tracking, and deadline monitoring

Coordinate post-event follow-ups: send tailored
s to speaking engagement attendees based on survey responses

Submit daily and weekly activity reports tracking completed work, blockers, and priorities



Admin (15%)

Support B2B outreach to wealth management firms and outplacement prospects via LinkedIn and

Research companies with recent layoffs to identify outplacement partnership opportunities





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

AI proficiency: Comfortable using ChatGPT and custom GPTs daily; can coach AI output rather than copy-paste

Strong written English: Can edit AI-generated content to sound natural and remove robotic patterns

Project management: Experience with Asana or similar tools; can organize, prioritize, and track work independently

Social media savvy: Familiar with LinkedIn content best practices; can schedule and manage posts

Reliable and communicative: Consistent availability, stable internet, responsive within working hours

Self-starter: Can follow Loom walkthroughs, written SOPs, and Google Docs instructions with minimal hand-holding



Compensation and Schedule:

Monthly RateApproximately $1,000 to $1,500 USD

Hours Starting part time 20-hours a week looking to grow into Full-time, 40 hours per week, aligned to Pacific Time with flexible async hours.



Schedule: Flexible async with preferred overlap starting at 2:00 PM Pacific (approximately 5:00 AM Philippine Standard Time) for 2 to 3 hours of daily communication

Start: ASAP



To Apply, send a cover letter and updated resume

title: Junior Engineer / Research Analyst
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Junior Engineer / Research Analyst to join a growing scientific research team.

This role is ideal for someone with a strong foundation in science or engineering (bonus if with bio-chemical knowledge) who is eager to apply their skills in real-world applications.

You will support feasibility studies, research, and technical analysis while working with modern tools, including AI, to improve workflows and reporting.

Note: This is not a traditional engineering design role — the focus is on research, analysis, and technical documentation.



U.S. Daytime Hours (PH Night Shift)



Duties and Responsibilities



- Assist in the preparation and development of feasibility studies for various projects

- Conduct research, data gathering, and analysis to support technical evaluations

- Collaborate with the team to assess technical and operational viability

- Utilize ClaudeAI and other tools to enhance workflows, documentation, and analysis

- Interpret scientific and technical data into clear, structured reports

- Support ongoing project planning and execution tasks

- Maintain organized documentation and records of findings

- Perform report writing and documentation

- Understand and assist in mapping basic IT/process flows



Qualifications

 - Bachelor’s degree or currently pursuing (3rd/4th year) in: Engineering (any relevant field), OR

 - Science-related courses (Biology, Chemistry, Biochemistry, Environmental Science, etc.)

 - Strong analytical and critical thinking skills

 - Experience with research, data analysis, or technical reporting (academic or professional)

 - Ability to read and understand scientific or technical material

 - Familiarity with AI tools or willingness to learn

 - Strong written English communication skills

 - Organized, reliable, and able to work independently

 - Ability to work during U.S. daytime hours



Nice to Have

 - Bio-chemical or life sciences background

 - Experience with feasibility studies or research-based projects

 - Exposure to engineering or scientific documentation





If you believe you're a strong fit for this position, please respond with the following:



1. A link to your resume in PDF format. 



          Your resume should include your contact details, a recent professional photo, and a summary of your work  

           experience, emphasizing tasks relevant to this role.



2. A screenshot of your PC specifications and internet speed, 



3. Your WhatsApp number for easy communication. 



To ensure you've read this message carefully, please include the word "RESEARCH" in the subject line of your
.



We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Community Manager & Sales Specialist
description:
We are hiring a Community Manager & Sales Specialist to grow and manage our online community on Skool and convert free members into paying subscribers and Academy students.



This is NOT a traditional VA role. You are a relationship builder and closer. You will spend your day having real conversations with barbers, understanding their goals, and guiding them toward our products.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY

• Welcome every new member with a personalised DM within 2 hours of joining

• Start real conversations in the community — comments, replies, DMs

• Identify members who are serious about levelling up their barbering career

• Pitch our Plus+ membership ($99/month) through genuine conversations, not hard selling

• Hand warm Academy leads to our sales team for phone follow-up

• Post daily engagement content — tips, polls, questions, challenges, wins

• Share student success stories and Academy graduate results weekly

• Run weekly live Q&A or mini-workshop inside the community

• Track and report: new members, conversations started, Plus+ conversions, Academy referrals

• Manage community moderation — remove spam, maintain quality



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Excellent written English — you will chat with Australians daily. Must sound natural and warm, not robotic

• Sales-minded but relationship-first. The best sales come from genuine conversations, not scripts

• Self-starter who works independently. We set KPIs, you figure out how to hit them

• Comfortable tracking your own metrics and reporting weekly

• Available during Australian business hours (8am–5pm AEST = 6am–3pm PHT)

• Bonus: experience selling online courses, memberships, or subscriptions



COMPENSATION

• Base: 55,000 PESO/month (paid monthly)

• Performance bonuses included

title: Outbound Sales Closer
description:
Type: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Compensation: $400 trial month, then after 3 clients $600/month base + High commission , 

GOAL is for your to be making over $1000/monthly 

Shifts Tuesday- Saturday



About the role



We are hiring full-time outbound sales closer to bring in new clients for our AI startup business. And WHO WILL TREAT THIS LIKE YOUR OWN BUSINESS

 



We provide businesses with services such as:

Professional Websites

AI Receptionist / call handling

AI Chatbot / omnichannel support



Your job is simple: call leads, run client meetings, and close clients.



This is a performance-focused role for someone who is confident, proactive, and serious about sales.



Who This Is For

This role is for someone who is hungry. 

 • You are self-motivated and do not need hand-holding

 • You are okay with hearing no 90 times a day and still dialing

 • You are coachable. My Goal long term is getting $1000+ per month 

 • You are hungry to grow into a closer role

 -  Looking to build a business



Who Is Not a Good Fit

 • Don't like making calls or sales

 • Rejection slows you down or kills your 
ntum

 • You need someone to check on you to stay consistent

 • Cant run there sales call 

 



If that is you — this is not your role and that is completely okay.



Responsibilities



Build prospect lists

Reach out through 100+ calls, 

Send DMs and other relevant channels

Follow up consistently

Run client meetings and sales calls

Present our services clearly and confidently

Handle objections and Close clients

Keep lead and sales activity organized

Report daily on activity and results

Target is 5 clients per month 



Requirements



Strong spoken and written English

Experience in outbound sales, cold calling, appointment setting, or closing

Confident making cold calls and running sales meetings

Strong objection-handling skills

Organized and results-focused

Reliable internet connection 40 mbs and quiet work environment

Backup Power Supply

Available full-time, 40 hours per week

Schedule Tuesday - Saturday 9am- 5pm EST



Compensation



Trial month: $400/month base salary

After passing trial: $600/month base salary

15% commission on setup fee (minimum $150+) per client

 5% on recurring clients monthly (Your business Portfolio)

- 5 clients/month x 15% of is $1000 setup = $600/month

- Plus 5% monthly x 4 = $100/month

- Total: $1,150/month

Bonus 5% commission on monthly ( ~$25+) per active client

For example if you brought in a total of 40 clients that's $1000/month recurring bonus for you.



Commission is paid only on collected revenue from clients you directly bring in and Bonus



Trial period and performance



This role starts with a 30-day trial.



Bare minimum required result in first 30 days: 1 closed client.



Longer term, this is a performance role. Where you can build a portfolio of business

Bare minimum result is 1 client for the first month, Target is 5 clients per month. Elites push past that 



If you cannot produce results, this role is not for you.



What we are looking for

Core Value- TREAT THIS LIKE YOUR OWN BUSINESS

We do not want a generic VA.

We want a real sales agent who can:



1. source leads

2. start conversations

3. follow up properly

4. run sales meetings

5. handle objections

6. bring in paying clients



To apply

Send a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself, just talk naturally and tell us why you are a good fit for this role. Include a short note or resume with any relevant experience. YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED UNLESS YOU SEND

title: Operations and Inventory Specialist
description:

Able to start within the next couple of weeks

Health insurance

Paid time off

title: Premium Fashion SEO Content Writer (Long-Term / Ongoing Role)
description:
About Us:

We are Spekt, a premium multi-brand fashion e-commerce retailer based in the UAE. We carry top-tier global brands (HUGO BOSS, Tommy Hilfiger, Lacoste, etc.) and compete with major luxury platforms like Ounass and Namshi. We need our website copy to reflect a high-end, curated, and premium shopping experience.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly skilled, native-level English fashion copywriter for an ongoing, long-term relationship.



Your first major project will be writing 100-120 word SEO category descriptions for our website. We will provide the category names, the specific brands to highlight, and the exact high-volume SEO keywords to include. If you crush this project, we will use you for all future website content, blog posts, and brand pages.



Our Tone of Voice (Crucial):

We absolutely DO NOT want generic, robotic, or AI-generated marketing copy (e.g., "Welcome to our store, we have the best high-quality clothes").



We write using an "Editorial Buyer" or "ASOS" style:



It must sound like a fashion magazine editor giving styling advice to a friend.



You must naturally weave in styling tips and outfit-building ideas (e.g., telling the customer to pair the shirt with wide-leg denim and chunky sneakers).



You must seamlessly integrate the provided SEO keywords without it looking forced.



Technical Requirements:



You must be comfortable hardcoding simple HTML anchor tags for links into the text. We use these descriptions to build our internal linking silo. (Example: "Filter by Nike for sporty tank tops...")



A strong understanding of modern SEO (LSI keywords, natural integration).



Strict Rule: We run all content through advanced AI detectors (like GPTZero). If you rely on ChatGPT to write your copy, please do not apply. We are looking for a unique, human, fashion-forward voice.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this entire description and have an eye for detail, please start your application with the word SPEKT.



In your application, you MUST provide a short, 2-sentence writing sample for a "Men's Oversized T-Shirts" category using our tone of voice. Assume the target keywords you need to include are "heavyweight cotton" and "streetwear fits".



Please also include a link to your portfolio or 2-3 previous fashion copywriting examples, and let us know your expected hourly or per-word rate.

title: Web & Community Operations Specialist (Sewing Niche)
description:
About SewShare

SewShare is a community-driven platform on a mission to unite seamsters (sewists) —from hobbyists to professionals—through a unique ecosystem of peer-to-peer support, expert resources, and real-time collaboration. We are a scrappy startup redefining how the world sews together.



The Role

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who is not just a "tech person," but someone who genuinely loves and understands the art of sewing garments. You will be a "digital tailor," ensuring our user experience is as seamless as a well-made hem. This role combines website management, SEO,
 marketing, and community participation and research.



Key Responsibilities

Website & UX Maintenance: Review and optimize WordPress webpages for better user flow. You will build technique-specific pages and FAQ sections using templates and AI support.



SEO & Store Audits: Audit store pages and product listings to improve SEO, image quality, and overall presentation.

 Marketing: Use Flodesk to design and build engaging
s, including content creation and layout using templates.

Feature Testing: Act as a "beta tester" for new site features and user journeys to ensure everything works perfectly before launch.



Content & Graphics: Create "Sew-along" and product pages from templates. Occasionally use Canva to develop simple, professional graphics based on our existing brand templates.

Community Research: Conduct research on Reddit and other forums to gather data and engage authentically with the sewing community.



Qualifications & Requirements

MUST have a passion for sewing: You should sew garments yourself (as a hobby or professionally) and understand sewing terminology (e.g., "seams," "patterns," "notions").  You don’t have to be an expert: advanced beginner sewing level is fine.

Technical Proficiency: Experience with WordPress and a solid understanding of SEO basics (Schema, metadata, image optimization).



 Marketing: Familiarity with Flodesk (or similar tools like Mailchimp/Klaviyo).

Detail-Oriented: You are the type of person who catches a typo or a broken link from a mile away.



Design Eye: Eye for creating clean, aesthetic digital assets when needed.



Reliability: High-speed internet and the ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



What We Offer

- A long-term opportunity for growth and education within a passionate startup.

- Flexible, remote work hours that respect your local time zone (with occasional overlap for meetings).

- The chance to combine your love for sewing with your professional digital skills.

title: Investigative Research Assistant - Real Estate
description:
We are a real estate company focused on solving complex title issues — properties with deceased owners, missing heirs, fractured ownership, and legal complications that prevent a normal sale. Our team specializes in deep research to understand ownership, identify the right parties, and create a clear path to resolution. This is not a high-volume operation — we prioritize precision, problem-solving, and the ability to navigate messy situations where others cannot.



------



This exercise is the application.



We are evaluating how you think, how deep you go, and how you connect information.



This is a research-heavy role. You will operate as an investigative researcher, finding people who are difficult to locate and building accurate family trees tied to property ownership.



I’ve attached two sample properties. For each one, your job is to figure out:

- Who is on title?

- Are they alive or deceased?

- If deceased, who are the rightful heirs?

- Are those heirs alive or deceased?

- If not, what does the full family tree look like?

- What is the condition of the property (well-maintained vs. distressed)?

- Are there any relevant signals tied to the owners/heirs (news, legal issues, arrest records, etc.)?



We focus on situations where owners are often unable to resolve things themselves. This can include financial distress, legal issues, or complex family dynamics.



We are not looking for surface-level answers. We are looking for people who can identify patterns and connect the dots — especially signals that point to difficult or high-friction ownership situations.



This is not a volume game. We expect ~10 cases per day, done with depth and accuracy.



Property 1 (DO NOT REACH OUT TO OWNERS):

19468 VFW Rd. Brooksville, FL 34601



Property 2 (DO NOT REACH OUT TO OWNERS):

702 Sheldon Cir. Port Orange, FL 32127



THE ONLY WAY TO APPLY IS GOING THROUGH THIS APPLICATION FORM:

If this opportunity interests you, we ask you to please complete a simple video task as a part of the application. ANY application submitted without completing the task will not be considered.

title: Amazon Creative Designer
description:
PLEASE READ: SHARE YOUR PORTFOLIO LINK AND RESUME



Position Type: Full Time

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 4:00 PM – 1:00 AM Philippine Time

Salary Range: Target rate of $7.00 – $7.50 USD / hour ($1,120 – $1,200/mo)

Note: To ensure a mutual fit, this role begins at $6.00 USD / hour ($960/mo) for a strict 90-day probationary period. Upon successfully completing probation and hitting your core performance KPIs, your rate automatically scales to the full $7.00–$7.50 target.



About the Company



Is a premium car-care brand founded by automotive enthusiasts who got tired of overpriced, over-marketed, low-quality detailing products and d
 to build something better. Since their first sale in 2015, they have grown into a trusted Amazon-native brand with six core SKUs, earning Best Seller badges and a loyal customer base built on repeat purchases and genuine word-of-mouth.



Every formula they sell is 100% mixed, bottled, and packaged in the USA using the latest advancements in science, along with safe ingredients. They work with world-class formulators and never release a product until it outperforms the top brands in head-to-head testing. They are a lean, high-performance team where every member has a direct impact on growth.

About the Role



We are hiring an Amazon Creative Designer who will own every visual and conversion-focused element of our Amazon listings. You will be responsible for our A/B testing pipeline, creative asset production, and listing CVR and CTR performance.



This is a design-first role. You won't be writing copy from scratch or doing manual keyword research — our proprietary AI system handles that entirely. It generates ready-to-use titles, bullet points, and a detailed creative brief that tells you exactly what to design and why. Your job is to QA the AI output, then bring the brief to life through elite-level graphic design and AI image generation (e.g., creating missing lifestyle scenes or realistic before-and-afters using tools like Nano Banana). We then run these assets through our A/B testing pipeline to continuously improve conversion rates.



If you have a world-class design eye, can leverage AI to refine listing copy, and know how to launch, track, and analyze A/B tests on Amazon — this is the role for you.



What This Role is NOT



This is not a Catalog Manager position. You may perform basic flat-file uploads to push winning test assets live, but you will not own backend catalog troubleshooting, case management, or account health — that is handled by a separate department.

 



What You Will Do



- Design High-Converting Creative Assets: Produce Main Images, Secondary/Lifestyle Images, Infographics, A+ Content modules, and Amazon Brand Store pages that communicate product benefits and convert browsers into buyers.

- Own the A/B Testing Pipeline: Design, launch, and manage experiments across all SKUs using Amazon’s Manage Your Experiments (MYE). You will continuously test creative and copy variations to drive conversion rate improvements.

- Execute from AI-Generated Briefs: You won't start from scratch. Our AI system delivers ready-to-use listing copy and a detailed creative brief for every project — including the exact wording, scenes, and design direction. Your job is to QA the output, then execute the design work. You will also leverage internal AI image generation tools (like Nano Banana) to build out missing visual assets, iterating on prompts to get the exact realistic output needed for your final composites.

- Monitor Listing Performance: Track key listing metrics such as CVR and CTR across all SKUs using our internal tools to spot trends, flag issues, and identify which listings need attention next.

- Maintain Brand Identity: Ensure every asset reinforces the CAR GUYS premium identity — from color palette and typography to tone and messaging.

- Follow & Maintain SOPs: Execute recurring weekly processes with discipline and consistency, keeping our optimization pipeline running smoothly.

 



Qualifications



Must-Have



- Elite Graphic Design Skills (3+ years): Professional graphic design experience with a strong portfolio demonstrating high-fidelity e-commerce creative (Amazon listing images, A+ Content, infographics). This is the #1 requirement — your portfolio is your resume.

- Amazon Listing Experience (2+ years): You've built A+ Content, Brand Store pages, and listing images inside Seller Central — you understand Amazon image guidelines, know what converts, and you don't need someone looking over your shoulder.

- A/B Testing Experience (1+ year): You've run real A/B tests (Amazon MYE preferred) to improve CTR and CVR, know how to read the data, and use results to drive the next iteration — not just report them.

- AI Image Generation & Iteration: You have practical experience prompting and iterating with AI image generators (Nano Banana, Midjourney, etc.). When we don't have a specific raw photo (e.g., a dirty vs. clean car panel), you know how to prompt the AI, iterate on the results until it looks realistic, and incorporate that output into your final listing images. You are also comfortable using text-based LLMs (Claude/Gemini) as a workflow assistant.

- Amazon Consumer Psychology: Even with an AI-generated brief, you must know how to visually translate those instructions into assets that convert. You have a deep understanding of visual hierarchy for mobile shoppers, benefit-driven imagery, trust signals, and what makes an Amazon customer click and buy.

Excellent English: Strong written and verbal English skills to refine AI-generated copy and communicate clearly with the team.

- SOP Discipline: Meticulous in following and maintaining Standard Operating Procedures. You take ownership, execute consistently, and do not need to be chased for updates.



Nice-to-Have



- Experience with Amazon Brand Analytics or third-party tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, etc.).

- Familiarity with Trello or similar project management tools.

- Background in automotive, car care, or enthusiast lifestyle brands.

- Experience with flat-file uploads in Seller Central.



Tools You Will Use

- Design: Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop/Illustrator) or Figma required. (Canva Pro also provided for quick/supplementary edits).

- AI: Claude, Gemini, Nano Banana, proprietary internal tools

- Amazon: Seller Central, Manage Your Experiments (MYE)

- Collaboration: Google Drive, Trello, Slack

 

Application Requirements

Portfolio Required: All applicants must include a link to their portfolio or samples of previous Amazon listing design work (images and A+ Content). Applications without a portfolio will not be prioritized

 

Technical Requirements



- Computer: Minimum 16 GB RAM (32 GB preferred). Must be capable of running your design tools smoothly with large, high-resolution files. If you use Adobe Creative Suite, a dedicated GPU is recommended.

- Internet: Fast, stable connection — minimum 50 Mbps (100 Mbps preferred). A mobile data hotspot is required as a backup in case of outages.

- Power Backup: If you are in an area prone to power outages, a UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) or similar backup solution is required to maintain connectivity during interruptions.

- Headset: Noise-canceling microphone preferred for team calls.

title: Business News Writers (Personal Finance & World News)
description:
We are looking for reliable, detail-oriented Business News Writers to join our growing editorial team. This role focuses on personal finance, global markets, economic trends, and major world news events that impact money, business, and everyday consumers.



The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of financial topics, economic developments, and global news, and can quickly turn complex stories into clear, engaging, and actionable articles.



Work Schedule



8:00 AM to 4:00 PM (Philippine Time)

Monday to Friday



Key Responsibilities



> Write 4 original business/news articles per day



> Cover topics such as personal finance, global economy, stock market trends, inflation, banking, investments, and major world news affecting money



> Translate complex financial and economic news into easy-to-understand, reader-friendly content

> Monitor breaking news, financial updates, global events, and economic trends

> Research stories using credible financial, business, and international news sources

> Fact-check all information before submission to ensure accuracy and credibility

> Write clear, engaging, and well-structured articles tailored for a broad audience

> Create compelling, SEO-friendly headlines with high click-through potential

> Follow editorial guidelines and consistently meet daily deadlines





Requirements



> At least 2 years of experience in business writing, journalism, finance blogging, or digital publishing

> Strong English writing and grammar skills

> Solid understanding of personal finance (loans, savings, credit, investments, cost of living, etc.)

> Good awareness of global news, economic trends, and financial markets

> Ability to quickly identify newsworthy stories and angles that impact readers financially

> Skilled in researching and verifying information from reliable financial and news sources

> Comfortable covering breaking news and fast-moving global events

> Ability to simplify complex topics into clear, engaging content

> Able to work independently and manage daily article output

> Experience with online publishing platforms or CMS is a plus



What We’re Looking For



> Strong interest in money, business, and global affairs

> High level of accuracy and attention to detail

> Strong headline writing skills (high CTR focus)

> Ability to produce fast, high-quality content under deadlines

> Good editorial judgment and understanding of what drives reader engagement in finance/news

> Consistency, reliability, and self-discipline



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are someone who:



> Follows global news, markets, and financial trends daily

> Understands how news impacts people’s money and financial decisions

> Can turn breaking news into engaging, actionable content quickly

> Writes with clarity, authority, and purpose — not fluff



Why Join Us



If you’re passionate about personal finance, global events, and business news — and can consistently deliver accurate, engaging, and high-impact content — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior Credit Analyst
description:
Senior Credit Analyst 

(Policy & Submission Quality) 



In Financial Services 

Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term Role 

 

About the Role 

In Financial Services operates a highly structured, system-led mortgage business built around strong credit assessment, clean submissions, and a controlled client experience. 



We are seeking a Senior Credit Analyst to manage complex lending files and ensure policy strength and submission quality across the business. 



This role forms part of our structured Credit Team and reports directly to our Australian-based Credit Manager. 



You will operate within defined lending standards and quality controls, working closely with brokers before submission to ensure deals are structured correctly, serviced accurately, and positioned clearly for lender assessment. 



This is a senior technical role focused on credit judgment, policy interpretation, and submission integrity. 



We value depth of knowledge, strong credit judgment, and consistent execution. This role is for someone confident in handling complexity — not someone learning it for the first time. 

 

What Success Looks Like 

A complex file enters Credit — company structure, SMSF, trust, layered income, or multi-security. 



From there: 

> Structure is reviewed and refined where required 

> Servicing is calculated accurately and aligned to lender policy 

> Risks are identified early and mitigated 

> Supporting documentation is complete and clearly organised 

> Submission notes are strategic and well-positioned 

> Files are lodged cleanly with minimal lender queries 

> Assessors receive clear, structured applications 



From the broker’s perspective, the deal is strong and submission-ready. 

From the lender’s perspective, the file is clear, complete, and easy to assess. 

From the business’s perspective, submission quality reduces friction and improves turnaround times. 

 

Key Responsibilities 

1. Assess and structure complex loan files prior to submission 

2. Interpret lender policy and apply correct credit positioning 

3. Complete accurate servicing calculations across multiple lender platforms 

4. Prepare structured and strategic submission notes 

5. Conduct final quality control checks before lodgement 

6. Collaborate with brokers to strengthen deal structure 

7. Escalate high-level policy concerns to the Credit Manager where required 

8. Maintain strong knowledge of lender updates and policy changes 

9. Support the continuous improvement of credit standards and submission quality 

 

Skills & Experience 

>> Minimum 3–5+ years’ experience within an Australian mortgage brokerage (mandatory) 

>> Experience preparing and structuring broker-originated loan submissions 

>> Strong experience across multiple lender servicing calculators 

>> Experience working across multiple lenders and comparing policy outcomes 

>> Proven ability to manage volume while maintaining accuracy and turnaround times 

>> Strong experience with first home buyer scenarios, along with more complex deals 

>> Practical knowledge of: 

    • Company and trust structures 

    • SMSF lending 

    • Multi-security loans 

    • Complex income scenarios 

>> Deep understanding of lender policy interpretation 

>> Strong analytical and problem-solving ability 

>> High attention to detail with structured file preparation 

>> Calm and confident communicator 

 

This Role Is Not 

(X) A junior processing role 

(X) A data-entry position 

(X) A purely administrative function 

(X) Not suited to candidates whose experience is solely within retail banking or internal credit assessment environments



How We Operate

We are not a slow-moving credit environment.

Our team operates at pace, and success in this role comes from being able to assess, structure, and deliver clean files quickly — without compromising quality.

Most of our volume comes from first-home buyers, so doing the fundamentals well, consistently, and efficiently is just as important as handling complexity.

 

Why Join Us 

-Long-term role within a growing Australian brokerage 

-Structured systems and clearly defined credit workflows 

-Direct reporting line to the Australian credit leadership 

-Established offshore team environment 

-Opportunity to influence credit standards and submission quality 

-Be part of a business that values precision, professionalism, and performance

title: FACEBOOK - META MEDIA BUYER – MED SPA, LASIK, IVF & PLASTIC SURGERY

SALARY: $1,500–2,000 USD/month (based on experience + substantial Performance-based Bonuses)

US (PST or EST) time zone overlap (minimum 4 hours); Time Doctor is Required



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing AI appointment generation agency serving high-value healthcare and aesthetics clients, including med spas, LASIK clinics, IVF centres, and plastic surgery practices. We generate premium appointments that convert into paying clients, and we’re looking for a Media Buyer who already has proven experience in these industries.



Direct experience running paid campaigns for med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery, a STRONG ADVANTAGE



WHAT YOU’LL MANAGE

•	Large monthly ad budgets across 15+ high-value client accounts in aesthetics and healthcare.

•	B2B campaigns: surgery consultations, IVF bookings, clinic demos.

•	B2C campaigns: med spa treatments, LASIK bookings, IVF discovery calls, plastic surgery consultations.

•	Full campaign lifecycle: strategy, setup, scale, optimisation.

•	Advanced audience segmentation and lookalike modelling.

•	CRM and marketing stack integration: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly.



CREATIVE RESPONSIBILITIES

•	Develop AI-driven content with heygen, Sora, ElevenLabs, nano banana pro.

•	Design and motion graphics using Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, CapCut.

•	Test creative angles, hooks, and ad formats specifically for med spa, LASIK, IVF, and plastic surgery clients.

•	Analyse creative performance to improve future campaigns.

•	Maintain brand consistency while scaling creative assets.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS

•	B2C Appointments: $50–150 CPA (varies by service)

•	B2B Appointments: $100–400 CPA (qualified consultations)

•	Minimum 2.5% CTR across campaigns

•	Maintain 60%+ landing page conversion rate

•	70%+ show rate for booked appointments

•	Weekly performance analysis with actionable optimisation insights



EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS

•	2+ years
/Meta Ads experience, with direct experience in med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery.

•	Portfolio demonstrating ad spend managed and appointment generation results.

•	Proven ability to scale campaigns 3x+ while maintaining cost targets.

•	Experience running both B2B and B2C appointment campaigns.

•	Multiple industry experience preferred.



WHAT TO PROVE IN YOUR APPLICATION

•	Screenshots of ad account dashboards showing spend and performance.

•	Specific cost per appointment improvements achieved (with numbers).

•	Biggest campaign rescue/turnaround story.

•	Experience managing large monthly ad budgets in healthcare or aesthetics.



TRAINING AND GROWTH PATH

•	First 30 days: Onboarding with our proven appointment generation frameworks.

•	Month 2–3: Full account ownership and performance accountability.

•	Ongoing: Advanced appointment generation strategies, AI creative training, and mentorship.

•	Performance bonuses tied to client retention and appointment quality.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

•	Advanced
 Business Manager and Ads Manager skills

•	Conversion tracking setup and optimisation

•	CRM integration experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly)

•	Landing page optimisation knowledge

•	Video editing software familiarity (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro)



PERSONALITY TRAITS WE’RE SEEKING

•	Obsessed with appointment quality and show rates, not just volume

•	Creative problem solver who thinks beyond templates

•	Takes ownership of results and client success

•	Proactive communication about performance trends

•	Organised, trustworthy, and able to deliver in a timely manner

•	Understands that compensation is based on a 40-hour work week

•	Understands that the use of Time Doctor is a productivity measure, not a matter of trust.



RED FLAGS (DON’T APPLY IF)

•	You are not available for full-time 40-hour work week

•	You cannot provide specific metrics from previous roles

•	You cannot commit to US (PST or EST) time zone overlap



COMPENSATION DETAILS

•	Base: $1,500–2,000/month depending on experience

•	Performance bonuses: $200–500/month for hitting appointment targets

•	Annual raises: 15–25% for top performers

•	Paid vacation and sick leave eligibility after 3 months

•	13th Month Salary eligibility after 3 months

•	Access to premium software, AI tools, live masterminds & paid communities



HOW TO APPLY

•	Start your message with: "Yes, I have read the job ad and I understand it fully"

•	Latest resume/CV with work history up to 2026



SELECTION PROCESS

1.	Application review (2–3 days)

2.	Skills assessment test (appointment generation scenarios)

3.	Video interview with performance deep-dive

4.	1-week paid trial project with real client account/campaign

5.	Final decision and onboarding



Please do not apply if you are not comfortable with Time Doctor as this is a non-negotiable requirement of the role. Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Direct Response Video Editor — AI UGC Ad Production (Meta/TikTok)
description:
IMPORTANT: Start your application message with the word "Pineapple" — applications that do not start with this word will not be read.



About the Role



We are a performance marketing team running direct response ad campaigns on Meta and TikTok. We need a video editor who understands direct response advertising and knows how to produce scroll-stopping video ads using AI tools.

This is not a traditional video editing role. You will be creating AI-generated UGC-style video ads from scratch — building characters, animating them, sourcing footage, and editing final ads ready to launch. Every ad you make will be tested with real money and you will see exactly how your work performs.



What You Will Be Doing



Building AI characters using Nano Banana Pro images

Animating those characters into talking head video clips using Kling 3.0 Motion Control

Sourcing high-quality a-roll and b-roll footage from stock libraries, social media and AI generation tools

Editing final video ads in CapCut or Premiere Pro

Adding captions, text overlays, pacing cuts, and sound design

Following script briefs and editor briefs we provide for each batch of ads

Producing 1080x1920 (9:16) vertical video ads optimized for Meta Reels and TikTok

Delivering 30-90 second final cuts ready for launch



What You Need To Know



Direct response advertising — you understand what makes people stop scrolling, watch, and buy. You know the difference between a brand ad and a direct response ad.

Nano Banana Pro — you have used it to generate AI characters and scenes. You know how to upload reference images, alter features, maintain character consistency across scenes, and generate product placement shots.

Kling 3.0 — you have used Motion Control to animate still images into talking head video clips. You know how to write Kling prompts that produce natural lip sync and realistic movement within the 4-6 second clip limit.

Video editing software — you are proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve. You can cut clips together with proper pacing, add captions, and export clean final files.

A-roll and b-roll sourcing — you know how to find high-quality footage from social media platforms and you understand when to use social media A/B Roll vs AI-generated visuals.

Ad creative fundamentals — you understand hook rates, hold rates, scroll-stopping visuals, pacing, and how to structure a video ad that converts.



Compensation



$20 USD per completed video ad (typically 30-90 seconds each)

Winning ad bonus — if your ad becomes a winning ad (profitable at scale), you receive a bonus on top of the base rate

We provide all logins and subscriptions for Nano Banana Pro, Kling 3.0, and any other AI tools needed — you do not need to pay for any software

Consistent work — we produce ads in batches of 3+ videos at a time with ongoing batches every other day



How To Apply



Start your message with the word "Pineapple" — this is required

Send a link to your portfolio showing video ads you have made using AI tools (Nano Banana, Kling, or similar). We want to see actual ads, not motion graphics or brand content.

Tell us briefly which AI tools you have experience with and how long you have been using them

Include 1-2 examples of direct response ads you have edited that were tested with real ad spend — tell us the results if you know them (hook rate, ROAS, purchases, etc.)

Tell us your typical turnaround time for a 30-45 second video ad from script to final cut



This Role Is NOT For You If:



You have never used Nano Banana or Kling before

You only do traditional video editing without AI tools

You do not understand direct response advertising

You cannot show examples of ads you have produced



We are looking for someone who can hit the ground running. If you know these tools and you understand what makes a direct response ad convert, we want to talk to you.

title: Graphic Designer (Print & Branding Specialist) – Remote (Philippines Only)
description:
We’re looking for a Graphic Designer who doesn’t just execute — but thinks, creates, and elevates ideas.



This role is focused on brand-building and print production — especially packaging, labels, and marketing materials.

If your experience is mostly social media templates, this won’t be the right fit.



We want someone with strong design taste, branding instinct, production-level print knowledge, and the energy to bring ideas to life.



**Who We Are:



Inner Fire was founded by Vish & Mae — partners in life and business.



Vish brings deep experience in entrepreneurship, performance, breathwork, and systems thinking.

Mae brings grounding, clarity, taste, and the ability to simplify without losing meaning.



We’re building Inner Fire slowly and intentionally:



Small team

High standards

Real relationships

No fluff, no hype



**What You’ll Do:



   - Design and develop brand-aligned visuals across print and digital

   - Create packaging, labels, inserts, and flyers

   - Translate ideas into clear, cohesive brand direction

   - Ensure all designs are production-ready for print

   - Maintain consistency across branding, typography, and layout systems

   - Bring fresh concepts, not just execution

   - Collaborate closely and contribute ideas proactively



**What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience as a Graphic Designer (mid-level or above)

Strong portfolio that shows:

Branding work (logos, identity systems, packaging)

Print-ready designs

Clean, modern, intentional design style

Strong understanding of visual hierarchy, typography, and layout

Ability to think concept-first, not just design-first



**Print & Packaging Experience (Required)



You must have hands-on experience preparing designs for print, including:



Setting up bleed, trim, and safe margins

Working with die lines for packaging (big plus)

Preparing files in correct formats (PDF, AI, EPS)

Understanding CMYK vs RGB and proper color conversion

Using rich black vs standard black correctly

Adjusting designs based on printer feedback or limitations



You should also be familiar with:

Color shifts during printing

Alignment and cutting tolerances

Resolution, export, and file setup issues

Layering and transparency handling for print



**Energy & Work Style:



Brings energy, enthusiasm, and creative drive

Proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

Confident in suggesting better ideas

Detail-oriented but still efficient

Positive, collaborative, and easy to work with



**Rate:

AUD $7 per hour



**How to Apply:



Send your application to: 



Include:



Portfolio (required — no portfolio, no review)

Resume

Expected hourly rate

A 1-minute Loom video (required) sharing:

   - Your branding and print experience

   - Any relevant work you’ve done

   - Why you’re a strong fit



Start your application with: INNERFIRE



If your work looks like everyone else’s, this role isn’t for you.

If you understand branding deeply and can execute at the print-production level — we want to see it!

title: NEED VIDEO EDITING + CONTENT DISTRIBUTION
description:
Job Summary



We are seeking a highly skilled Video Editor & Content Specialist to transform long-form educational content into engaging, polished videos for YouTube and other digital platforms. The ideal candidate has strong video editing ability, excellent written and spoken English, sharp attention to detail, and a solid understanding of what makes content engaging on social media. This person should be a fast learner, highly organized, and able to thrive in a fast-paced, evolving business environment. This role will play an important part in the day-to-day growth and content development of our brand.



Key Responsibilities



- Edit long-form YouTube videos with strong pacing, clean visuals, and engaging flow

- Find the best 
nts from long videos and turn them into short clips for YouTube Shorts and other platforms

- Repurpose content into other useful formats, including short clips, blog posts, and other content assets

- Add captions, graphics, and other visual elements to make videos more engaging and easier to follow

- Create eye-catching, brand-aligned thumbnails using Canva or Photoshop

- Upload and organize course and member area content inside Kajabi

- Maintain an organized workflow and content library to keep projects and assets easy to manage



 Required Skills & Qualifications



- Proven video editing experience for YouTube and/or social media content

- Strong understanding of pacing, retention, and what makes online content engaging

- Good English communication skills, both written and spoken

- Ability to create short-form clips from long-form content

- Experience with captions, graphics, and basic motion-based visual enhancements

- Ability to design strong thumbnails in Canva or Photoshop

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

- Ability to manage content files, workflows, and deadlines without constant oversight

- Comfortable using or learning tools such as Kajabi, Canva, Photoshop, and video editing software

- Coachable, dependable, and able to work in a fast-moving environment



Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)



- Experience editing finance, investing, or trading-related content

- Understanding of retention and engagement strategies for YouTube and social media

- Experience with Kajabi

- Experience creating thumbnails in Canva or Photoshop

- Familiarity with YouTube content strategy and repurposing long-form content into short-form assets

- Ability to match an existing brand style across videos, thumbnails, and content assets



Tools & Software Proficiency



- Strong working knowledge of Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and/or Final Cut Pro

- Proficiency with Canva for thumbnail design and simple branded graphics

- Comfortable using Google Workspace, including Drive, Docs, and Sheets

- Experience with Kajabi is preferred, but willingness to learn quickly is acceptable



Work Style & Expectations



- This is a task-based role, not an hourly role

- You will be assigned projects and deliverables with specific deadlines

- Your job is to complete the work at a high level and deliver it on time

- There are no fixed 8-hour shifts

- The schedule is flexible, but reliability is essential

- Clear communication and consistent follow-through are expected

- Ability to manage workflow independently, stay on top of deadlines, and execute deliverables consistently



Benefits & Perks



- Fully remote work

- Flexible schedule

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-growing online trading education brand

- Room to expand into a larger creative role over time

- Compensation will depend on experience and skill set, with room to grow over time based on performance.



Editing Standard



Important: Please review this sample video before applying: 
 

This is the minimum standard of editing quality expected for this role.



How to Apply



If you are interested in applying for this position, please Direct Message me your resume, work example, or portfolio. In your cover letter, briefly explain why you are a great fit for this role and how your skills align with our company’s needs.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Cold Caller/ Appointment Setter
description:
**Real Estate Appointment Setter (Outbound Calls – US Market)**



We are looking for a confident and experienced **outbound caller / appointment setter** to contact real estate agents and book appointments for our team leader.



This is NOT an admin role. You will be speaking with professionals daily, so strong communication skills and confidence on the phone are critical.



---



**Responsibilities:**



* Make outbound calls to real estate agents using a dialer

* Have natural, professional conversations (not just reading a script)

* Book qualified appointments for the team leader

* Accurately log call notes and updates in Go High Level (GHL) CRM

* Follow up with leads via call and text when needed



---



**Requirements:**



* Proven experience in **cold calling, appointment setting, or telemarketing**

* Experience speaking with **US-based clients**

* **Fluent to Excellent English (C1–C2 level required)**

* Confident, clear, and professional speaking voice

* Comfortable handling objections and leading conversations

* Reliable internet and ability to work during US hours



---



**? Schedule:**



* Monday–Friday

* 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST)



---



**???? Compensation:**



* Hourly pay based on experience

* Performance bonuses for booked appointments



---



** IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY:**

To be considered, you MUST include:



1. A **60-second voice recording** introducing yourself

2. A second recording **pretending you are calling a real estate agent to set an appointment**



Start your application with the word: **GROWTH**



Applications without voice recordings will not be reviewed.



---



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with our team and play a key role in building relationships with agents.

title: B2B Sales Representative (Remote – Philippines) – Recruitment Services
description:
Location:

Remote (Philippines only)  

Work Hours: Flexible, aligned with Australian business hours (you will be given your specific working window)



Job Type:

Longterm





About the Role

We are looking for a driven B2B Sales Representative based in the Philippines to actively sell our recruitment and staffing services to businesses in Australia and overseas. You will focus on outbound prospecting, lead generation, and closing new clients for our recruitment business.



You will work remotely from the Philippines, following clear sales processes, scripts, and tools we provide. This is a long?term role with performance?based incentives and the opportunity to grow into a senior sales or account?management position.





Key Responsibilities

- Prospect and qualify potential clients (business owners, HR managers, hiring managers) via LinkedIn,
, and cold calling.  

- Follow up with leads, schedule discovery calls, and present our recruitment services.  

- Hit monthly KPIs for calls, meetings booked, and new clients signed.  

- Manage opportunities in the CRM and keep all activity accurately recorded.  

- Provide feedback on what messaging and offers work best with prospects.  

- Work closely with the recruitment team to ensure smooth handover of new clients.





Requirements

- At least 2 years of experience in outbound B2B sales (staffing, recruitment, lead generation, or similar services preferred).  

- Excellent English communication (both spoken and written).  

- Comfortable with cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and
 campaigns.  

- Confident closing new clients and discussing pricing/service options.  

- Ability to work independently, stay focused, and meet targets.  

- Stable internet, quiet workspace, and a laptop or PC.  

- Availability during Australian business hours (flexible, but you must be able to cover part of this window).





What We Offer

- Long?term opportunity (initial 12?month contract, with potential for renewal).  

- Clear commission / performance structure based on new clients, meetings, and targets (exact details discussed in interview).  

- Training on our recruitment services, sales process, and tools.  

- Remote work from anywhere in the Philippines.  

- Regular performance reviews and opportunities for bonuses and role growth.





How to Apply

Please apply via OnlineJobs.ph and include:  

- A short introduction explaining your sales experience and why you’re interested in this role.  

- Your expected monthly rate.

- Your availability (timezone/work hours you can commit to).  

- Any experience selling recruitment, staffing, or B2B services.



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for online interview.

title: Senior Bookkeeper
description:
Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Financial Operations

*Manage full-cycle bookkeeping (A/R, A/P, general ledger, reconciliations)

*Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in QuickBooks

*Process payroll and ensure accuracy of employee compensation records

*Manage invoicing, collections, and vendor payments

*Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

*Support tax preparation by maintaining organized financial documentation



Financial Reporting & Analysis

*Prepare and maintain weekly and monthly financial reports

*Build and manage Excel-based reports and dashboards to track performance

*Analyze variances in revenue, expenses, and key financial metrics

*Track KPIs and provide clear summaries of financial performance

*Assist leadership in understanding financial trends and business health



Data Integrity & Process Improvement

*Ensure accuracy and consistency across financial data and reporting systems

*Identify discrepancies and resolve issues proactively

*Improve reporting processes and streamline financial workflows

*Collaborate with leadership to improve visibility into financial performance



Required Experience & Skills

*3+ years of experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or financial operations is required

*Strong experience with QuickBooks is required.

*Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis) is required

*Experience managing A/R, A/P, payroll, and reconciliations is required

*Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy

*Ability to organize and present financial data clearly

*Experience with doing financial auditing is a huge plus

*Experience supporting US-based businesses is a plus





TECH REQUIREMENTS

Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed





Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: 1PM-9PM PST M-F / 4AM - 12 PM PHT Th-S

title: E-Commerce & Digital Marketing Specialist Needed – Launch New Hot Sauce Retail Brand from Scratch! (Remote – Philippines
description:
We are a successful hot sauce company already selling wholesale to restaurants and distributors in the US. Now we’re starting a completely new retail company selling premium hot sauces directly to individual customers and homes across the United States under a different brand.

This is a ground-up build — everything starts from zero. We’re looking for one skilled, driven person in the Philippines to be the key player who makes it all happen.

Position:

E-Commerce & Digital Marketing Specialist (Full-Time Remote)

What You Will Do:



Build and manage our full Shopify website from scratch (design, theme setup, product pages, shopping cart, checkout, payments, etc.)

Set up and optimize sales channels including Shopify and Amazon

Create high-converting TikTok ads (including shooting/editing the videos yourself)

Run and optimize
 & Instagram ads (Meta Ads Manager)

Combine advertising + sales strategies to drive traffic, conversions, and real revenue

Help with light CRM work in Zoho (not the main focus)

Work directly with the US founder to grow this new retail brand step by step



This is a hands-on “wear many hats” role in a true startup environment. Your work will directly impact sales and the success of the new company.

What We’re Looking For (Must-Have Experience):



You have already built and launched Shopify e-commerce stores before (portfolio required)

You have run successful TikTok ad campaigns (including creating the videos yourself)

You have solid experience with
 & Instagram ads

You understand Amazon selling or similar marketplaces

You are comfortable combining website building, advertising, and sales into one role

You are self-motivated, love challenges, and can work independently

Excellent English communication

You can work US business hours (Central Time – this will be evening/night shifts in the Philippines)



Compensation:



Competitive base salary (paid monthly)

Generous sales commission (you get paid as we sell — the more successful the store and ads, the more you earn)

Opportunity to grow with the company as we scale the new retail brand



This is a real opportunity to be part of building something from the very beginning and earn both a solid base pay plus uncapped commission as sales grow.

How to Apply:

Upload your résumé and portfolio directly on this platform.

Include links to:



Shopify sites you have built

TikTok ad campaigns you created and ran (include sample videos)

/Instagram ad results you are proud of



Only applicants with clear, proven experience in Shopify + TikTok/Facebook ads will be considered. We move fast!

title: Construction Finance and Real Estate Underwriting Assistant
description:
Starting at $5 per hour depending on expertise

Part time with room to grow



We are looking for a sharp, dependable, and systems minded professional to help support the financial side of a growing real estate investment and development business.



This position involves assisting with analyzing potential deals, organizing project financials, monitoring construction related costs, and helping maintain accurate financial records and reporting.



The right candidate enjoys working with numbers, spotting inconsistencies, improving spreadsheets, and supporting better decision making.



Core Duties



Investment Review Support

Help review prospective deals by organizing assumptions, evaluating projected performance, and assisting with preliminary feasibility analysis.



Financial Organization and Cost Monitoring

Maintain and update project cost trackers, review expense activity, and help keep budgets organized and current.



Reporting and Cash Position Support

Assist with maintaining cash tracking tools and preparing simple reports to help leadership monitor financial activity.



Investor and Capital Records

Help organize records related to investor contributions, distributions, and related tracking.



Bookkeeping and Financial Coordination

Support coordination with outside bookkeeping, lenders, and accounting professionals to help keep financial information aligned.



Spreadsheet and Systems Improvements

Help strengthen internal tracking tools and suggest practical improvements to support efficiency and growth.



Preferred Background



Strong working knowledge of Excel or Google Sheets



Experience in financial support, analysis, accounting, or related work



Strong organizational ability and attention to detail



Exposure to real estate, construction, or development is helpful



Self directed, reliable, and resourceful



Strong English communication skills



Compensation



Starting at $5 per hour depending on expertise



Part time role with opportunity to expand over time



To Apply



Please submit:



1. Resume



2. Brief Video, 3 to 5 minutes

Please share:



How you would approach organizing finances across multiple real estate projects



Why this role is a good fit for your background



3. Simple Sample Spreadsheet

Please submit one sample only showing your approach to one of the following:



Project cost tracking



Cash tracking



Investor tracking



Simple and practical is preferred.



We are looking at how you think, how you organize information, and how you approach real world financial support.

title: Marketing & Ops Systems Manager
description:
