 that clearly outline workflows, ownership, dependencies, and handoffs across teams

title: Credit Repair Disputer (FTC / CFPB / Credit Cloud Experience Required)
description:
We are a growing credit repair business looking for an experienced Credit Repair Disputer to handle client disputes, manage accounts, and keep our system organized.



You will be responsible for handling disputes using FTC reports, CFPB complaints, and credit bureau letters, while keeping accurate records inside Credit Cloud Repair and tracking client progress.



Responsibilities:



* Create and send dispute letters to:

    * Credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

    * Creditors & collection agencies

* File and manage disputes through:

    * FTC identity theft reports

    * CFPB complaints

* Update and manage client accounts inside Credit Cloud Repair

* Track:

    * What each client paid

    * Services they are on

    * Progress of disputes

* Maintain organized Google Sheets with:

    * Client status

    * Payments

    * Dispute rounds

* Upload and manage client documents (ID, proof of address, etc.)

* Communicate updates clearly with team



Requirements:



* MUST have experience in credit repair disputing

* Familiar with:

    * FTC reports (identity theft)

    * CFPB complaints

    * FCRA laws (basic understanding)

* Experience using Credit Cloud Repair (preferred)

* Strong organization skills

* Good with Google Sheets / Excel

* Attention to detail (VERY IMPORTANT)

* Able to follow systems and SOPs



To Apply:



Send the following to 

1. Your experience with credit repair

2. Tools you’ve used (Credit Cloud, etc.)

3. Example of a dispute you’ve done (if available)

4. Answer this question:

    ???? “How do you handle a client with multiple collections and late payments?”

title: Medical Billing & Denial Recovery Specialist (DME Focus) – Remote
description:
Company: VIP Durable Medical Equipment (VIP DME)

Location: Remote (Philippines Preferred)

About Us

• VIP Durable Medical Equipment is a rapidly growing DME provider serving patients across Central California.

• We specialize in hospital beds, wheelchairs, incontinence supplies, wound care, and more.

• We are seeking a Denial Recovery Specialist to help recover outstanding insurance claims.

Position Overview

• This role focuses on working denied claims and recovering revenue.

• You will identify issues, correct claims, follow up with payers, and ensure payment is received.

• This is a proactive, ownership-driven role.

Key Responsibilities

• Review and work denied claims daily

• Identify root causes of denials

• Correct and resubmit claims

• Submit prior and retro authorizations

• Follow up with insurance companies

• Communicate with internal team for documentation

• Maintain denial tracking system

• Document all actions clearly

Requirements

• 2+ years medical billing experience (REQUIRED)

• Experience working denied claims (REQUIRED)

• Familiarity with Medicare, Medi-Cal, and commercial insurance

• DME billing experience preferred

• Experience with Brightree, Availity, or similar systems

• Strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication

• Ability to work independently

Performance Expectations

• Work and update denials daily

• Maintain accurate tracking

• Meet follow-up timelines

• Resolve and recover claims

• Communicate proactively

Compensation

• Competitive hourly rate

• Performance-based bonuses tied to recovered revenue

Why Join Us

• Fast-growing company

• Performance-driven environment

• Clear systems in place

• Direct impact on revenue

How to Apply

• Summary of denial experience

• Systems used (Brightree, Availity, etc.)

• Example of resolved denial

• Availability and internet setup

• Note: Applications without denial experience will not be reviewed

title: Bookkeeper
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Bookkeeper to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing day-to-day accounting tasks, and supporting overall financial operations. The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, and comfortable working with accounting systems and financial data.



Key Responsibilities:



- Record and maintain financial transactions in accounting systems

- Perform bank and credit card reconciliations

- Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

- Process and track invoices and payments

- Assist with payroll coordination (e.g., via Gusto or similar platforms)

- Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)

- Support month-end and year-end closing processes

- Ensure accuracy and resolve discrepancies in financial data



Qualifications:



- 1+ years of bookkeeping experience

- Strong understanding of accounting principles

- Proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Experience with Microsoft Excel

- High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Excellent communication skills



Interested? Please apply on this link: 
.com/wellaware-apply

title: Tech Operations and Automation Manager ($1,500–$2,000/month)
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

description:

This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

Important Note: This role requires regular proactive follow-up with clients. If you're not comfortable with this, please consider carefully before applying - it's a core part of the position.



What We’re Looking For

Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.

title: YouTube Scriptwriter (Retention-Driven, SOP-Based)

title: Video Clipper and Editor — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: Administrative Virtual Assistant – E-commerce Company
description:
About Us:

We are a growing e-commerce and brand distribution company based in Canada. We are expanding our operations and looking for a reliable and organized Administrative Virtual Assistant to join our small, remote team.



Position Overview:

This is a part-time administrative support role. You will work directly with the business owner to handle a wide variety of administrative, operational, and personal tasks, freeing up the owner to focus on business growth.



Responsibilities:



Bookkeeping and Invoices:

Assist with invoice tracking, basic bookkeeping tasks, and expense reconciliation.

Maintain accurate financial records and flag any discrepancies.



 and Communications:

Manage and triage business
 inboxes, flagging urgent items and drafting routine responses.

Communicate with suppliers and brand contacts on behalf of the business owner.

Maintain records of communications and follow up on outstanding items.



What is one thing you enjoy doing outside of work?

Reporting and Data Entry:

Maintain weekly and monthly reports on business operations.

Update spreadsheets and internal trackers with accurate data.

Upload documents to cloud storage as needed.



Back-End Operations Support:

Manage open cases and tickets with online marketplaces, follow up and escalate when needed.

Monitor inventory health and coordinate inbound shipments.

Track and action shipment discrepancies and missing or damaged items. When submitting your application, please use the following subject line: VA Application - [Your Name] - [Your Favourite Food]. Applications that do not follow this format will not be considered.



Marketplace Listings:

Post items to various online marketplaces as directed.

Maintain listing accuracy, update pricing, and respond to buyer inquiries.



Trip and Calendar Planning:

Assist with planning business trips, including trade shows, flights, hotels, and logistics.

Help with personal trip research, bookings, and itinerary coordination.



Executive Assistant Support:

Help manage the business owner's schedule, reminders, and priorities.

Handle ad hoc tasks and personal administrative requests as needed.



What We Are Looking For:

Proven experience as a virtual assistant or executive assistant in an administrative role.

Fluent in English, both written and spoken.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks independently.

Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) and Google Suite.

Comfortable with basic bookkeeping or willing to learn.

Reliable internet connection with a minimum speed of 25 Mbps. Please include a screenshot of your internet speed test results with your application.

Minimum 2 computer monitors.

A quiet workspace and a dedicated desktop or laptop.



What is your favourite food?

Computer Requirements:

Minimum 12 GB RAM.

10th generation Intel processor or newer, or equivalent Apple Silicon (M1 or newer).



Position Details:

Part-time, 20 hours per week, with potential to grow to full-time.

Work from home, remote.

Reports directly to the business owner.



What We Offer:

Competitive part-time salary commensurate with experience.

Flexible schedule within agreed hours.

13th month bonus.

Opportunity to grow into a full-time role as the business expands.

A supportive, small-team environment where your work has direct impact.



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience and why you are a good fit for this role. In your cover letter, tell us about a time you managed multiple tasks or priorities at once and how you handled it. Please also include a short Loom video introduction, no more than 2 minutes, telling us a bit about yourself, your experience, and why you are interested in this role. Please include a photo of your computer setup along with your application.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Job Overview



The client is looking for a skilled and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist with a strong background in the travel industry. This role is responsible for developing and executing digital marketing strategies that attract, engage, and convert customers across multiple online platforms.

The ideal candidate is both creative and analytical, with the ability to produce compelling content while leveraging data insights to continuously optimize performance and drive brand growth.

 

Key Responsibilities

Content Creation & Management

Develop, curate, and manage content across digital platforms, including websites, social media, blogs, and
 campaigns

Create engaging, informative, and visually appealing content focused on travel destinations, experiences, and tips

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure accurate and compelling promotion of travel products and services

 

Social Media Management

Plan and execute social media strategies to increase brand awareness, engagement, and audience growth

Manage day-to-day social media activities, including content scheduling, posting, and community engagement

Monitor trends within the travel industry to keep content fresh, relevant, and competitive

 

 Marketing & CRM

Develop and execute
 marketing campaigns, including newsletters, promotions, and automated customer journeys

Segment audiences to deliver personalized and targeted messaging

Monitor and optimize
 performance metrics such as open rates and conversions



To check if you are reading this, add the word "Blue" on the
 subject.

 

Paid Advertising

Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns across platforms such as Google Ads and social media channels

Monitor campaign performance and optimize for maximum return on investment (ROI)

Conduct A/B testing to improve ad effectiveness

 

Analytics & Reporting

Track and analyze key performance metrics using tools such as Google Analytics and platform insights

Prepare regular reports with actionable insights and recommendations

Use data to inform decisions and improve overall marketing strategies

 

Collaboration & Coordination

Work closely with Sales, Product, and Customer Support teams to align marketing initiatives with business goals

Coordinate with external partners or agencies when required

 

Qualifications & Requirements

Proficiency in tools such as Google Analytics,
 Ads Manager, Canva, Mailchimp (or similar CRM platforms), and scheduling tools

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and collaboratively

 

Preferred Qualifications

In-depth understanding of travel industry trends and customer behavior

Experience with A/B testing, landing page optimization, and conversion strategies

Familiarity with CRM systems, audience segmentation, and retargeting techniques

 

Ideal Candidate Profile

Creative thinker with strong storytelling abilities

Data-driven and results-oriented

Proactive, adaptable, and highly organized

Passionate about travel and digital marketing

Committed to continuous learning and improvement

p?minutes=0.5&textfile=0&mode=sent&result_url=

 Subject Line

/message, briefly share:

title: Content Writing Specialist With SEO Expertise

About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service. Our main headquarters is located in Garden Grove, California.

 newsletters, and other marketing channels.

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

Competitive pay plan.

Very flexible work schedule — work when and where you do your best writing.

Supportive environment that values creativity, growth, and your love of watches.

Opportunities to build a personal voice and authority in the luxury watch space.

a. Tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. What are your career/life goals and in what amount of time?

How could you have made it easier/faster/better using AI?

title: Ad-Hoc Video Editor (Remote | Freelance)
description:
We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Video Editor to support us on an ad-hoc / project basis. If you can switch between fast-paced social content and more structured training videos, this role is for you.



Role Overview



You’ll be editing a mix of:



Short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Longer-form videos such as teacher training sessions, workshops, and recorded presentations



Work will come in batches or per project, depending on our needs.



Responsibilities

Edit engaging short-form videos for social media

Clean up and structure training recordings (e.g. teacher training sessions, workshops)

Cut dead air, improve flow, and enhance clarity for educational content

Add captions, text overlays, and simple motion graphics

Sync audio, improve sound quality, and ensure clear delivery

Follow brand guidelines and creative direction

Deliver outputs on time



Requirements

Proven video editing experience (portfolio required)

Skilled in tools like Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut, or similar

Strong attention to detail—especially for longer, structured content

Ability to organize and edit raw recordings into clear, easy-to-follow videos

Good communication and reliability

Stable internet and ability to meet deadlines



Nice to Have

Experience editing educational or training content

Familiarity with subtitles/captions for accessibility

Basic color correction and audio cleanup skills

Motion graphics (After Effects is a plus)



Compensation

Paid per project / per video

Rates depend on complexity and experience

Opportunity for ongoing work if performance is strong



How to Apply



Send:



Portfolio (especially samples of both short-form and longer videos)

Tools/software you use

Your rate (per video or hourly)

Intro + experience with training or educational content (if any)



We’re looking for someone who can edit efficiently while keeping content clear, engaging, and professional.

title: 3D Visualizer (Retail & POSM)
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking a skilled 3D Visualizer with experience in a creative or agency environment to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for translating design concepts into high-quality, realistic 3D visualizations for retail environments and Point of Sale Materials (POSM). You will work closely with designers and account managers to produce compelling visuals that effectively communicate design intent and meet client expectations.



Key Responsibilities:



-Create detailed 3D models using SketchUp and produce high-quality renders using Enscape.

-Develop visualizations for full retail store layouts, merchandising displays, and POSM units.

-Collaborate with Senior Interior Designers and Account Managers to ensure designs align with project requirements and client briefs.

-Ensure accuracy in textures, lighting, materials, and spatial proportions to achieve realistic and visually compelling results.

-Revise and refine visualizations based on feedback while maintaining project timelines.

-Maintain organized project files and adhere to internal design standards.



Requirements:



-Expert-level proficiency in SketchUp and Enscape.

-Proven experience working in a creative or design agency, preferably within retail design or brand activation.

-Strong attention to detail with the ability to deliver high-quality work under tight deadlines.

-Excellent communication and collaboration skills with a proactive and dependable work ethic.



A strong portfolio showcasing retail environments, store layouts, and detailed POSM or product displays is a MUST

title: Video Editor - Music/Entertainment
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Have you ever wanted to work in the music industry? Or maybe edit dance videos along with some entertainment content?



We’re looking for a full-time Video Editor to join our creative team working across music and entertainment content. You'll be editing both long-form videos for YouTube and short-form content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts. The role requires strong proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve, as well as a good eye for storytelling, colour grading, and rhythm. You’ll need to be deeply familiar with current video trends, formats, and audience expectations across platforms.



This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone based in the Philippines with a fast, stable internet connection and a strong computer setup. We’re looking for someone who’s not just technically skilled, but creative, fast-moving, organised, and excited by the idea of working on meaningful projects that engage real audiences. This is not a corporate job—it's a dynamic role in an evolving creative ecosystem with opportunities for growth and creative input.



Why You’ll Love This

This is not corporate. You’ll be part of the team for two internationally breaking artist projects that blend music, personality, and culture. One is signed to a major record label and the other has a social media following of over 400K.



You’ll play a big role in how their music comes to life visually—and there’s potential to grow with the team long-term.

title: Property Operations Coordinator
description:
Remote Property Operations Coordinator (AU Short-Term Rentals)

Philippines-based | Full-time | AEST-aligned



Join One of Australia’s Largest Short-Term Rental Businesses



This is a rare long-term opportunity to work directly with one of Australia’s most established short-term rental operators — supporting a growing portfolio of up to 800 properties across NSW.



Staff Connect Australia is building a high-performing offshore team, and we’re looking for a proactive, detail-driven Property Operations Coordinator to become one of our foundational hires. If you’re sharp, confident on calls, and love problem-solving in a fast-paced environment, this role has serious growth potential.



You’ll be right at the heart of daily operations — handling bookings, guest and owner communications, issue resolution, and admin support — with exposure to every part of Australian short-term rental management.



What You’ll Be Doing



This is a hands-on, dynamic role. Your responsibilities will include:

- Guest & Owner Support

- Handle inbound and outbound calls with guests and property owners via Aircall

- Respond to enquiries and issues via Airbnb, 
, direct bookings

- Resolve problems efficiently and follow through to completion





Operations & Coordination

- Monitor bookings, availability, and calendars using Homhero, RMS, and other systems

- Coordinate cleaning schedules and ensure properties are guest-ready

- Assign and follow up maintenance tasks with trades or contractors

- Track cleans, maintenance, guest issues, and owner communications



Admin, Reporting & Growth

- Manage booking calendars, pricing, and blackout dates

- Assist with onboarding new properties and system setup

- Support compliance documentation (smoke alarms, council registration, etc.)

- Prepare weekly/monthly reports using spreadsheets or dashboards

- Help draft and improve SOPs, internal docs, and guest manuals

- Identify workflow gaps and suggest smarter processes or automations



As the business grows, your role will grow with it — including pricing, owner reporting, SOP ownership, and broader operational oversight.



Who We’re Looking For



You’re someone who:

- Is confident on the phone and professional with both guests and property owners

- Thrives in fast-paced, customer-facing environments

- Is organised, proactive, and solutions-focused

- Can juggle multiple tools and tasks without being micromanaged

- Takes ownership and actually cares about doing things properly



Skills & Experience



Required:

- Excellent spoken & written English

- Stable internet connection

- Confident handling phone calls

- Experience (or fast learning ability) with Aircall, Homhero

- Familiarity with Airbnb, 
, and direct booking sites

- Strong organisational & multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)



Preferred (but not mandatory)



- 2+ years in short-term rentals, property management, or admin support

- Experience working with Australian clients

- Exposure to cleaning teams or remote contractors



We’re open to candidates with less experience if you show initiative, strong communication skills, and the right mindset.



Tools You’ll Use

Core Systems:

- Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana

- Comms & Support:

- Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp

- Automation & Docs:

- ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress



Bonus Tools:

- PriceLabs or other pricing platforms





What You’ll Get:



- Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned)

- Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts

- You’ll work one or both weekend days

- Always two consecutive days off each week

- Paid training & onboarding

- Direct mentorship from leadership

- Long-term career growth in a scaling business

- Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations



A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

title: Graphic Designer Expert for Full Plumbing Company Rebrand
description:
Job Type:



Remote | Project-Based | Independent Contractor

Location Preference: Philippines

About the Role

We are Yess Boss Plumbing, a growing plumbing company based in Ontario, Canada. We are hiring a highly skilled Senior Brand Identity Designer to lead the visual side of our company rebrand.

This is not a simple logo job. We are looking for someone who can build a complete brand identity system and apply it across all major business materials with consistency, professionalism, and strong creative direction.

We want someone who can create a bold, memorable, high-quality brand for a service business and carry that design across everything from vehicle wraps to print materials and digital assets.



Estimated Project Timeline:

This project is expected to take approximately 8 to 12 weeks, depending on communication speed, revision rounds, and final scope.



Scope of Work

This project may include:

Logo design and logo variations

Brand colors and typography

Brand identity system and guidelines

Van / truck wrap design

Business card design

Stationery and branded company materials

Uniform / apparel design

Flyers, brochures, and leave-behind materials

Yard signs and outdoor advertising graphics

Social media brand assets

Website banners and promotional graphics

Other visual materials required for a complete rebrand

Who We Are Looking For



You are a strong fit if you:

Have proven experience in branding and rebranding

Can design complete visual identity systems, not just one-off graphics

Understand both creative branding and production-ready design

Can create polished work for print, signage, wraps, apparel, and digital use

Know how to maintain brand consistency across different formats

Communicate clearly, follow direction well, and deliver work professionally

Can manage a project from concept to final files



Preferred Experience:

Home service or trades branding such as plumbing, HVAC, electrical, roofing, construction, or similar

Strong Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign skills

Experience creating print-ready and production-ready files

Experience with vehicle wrap design



Important:

This is a project-based contractor role for a remote designer based in the Philippines. We are looking for someone who can handle a full rebrand professionally and deliver high-quality work from start to finish.

If the fit is strong, this may lead to ongoing design work after the rebrand is complete.



To Apply, Please Send:

Your portfolio

Examples of full branding or rebranding projects

Examples of vehicle wrap designs, business cards, and print materials

A short message explaining why you are a strong fit for this role

A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself, sharing your design experience, and explaining why you are a good fit for this project

Screening Instructions

To help us identify serious applicants, please do all of the following:

Start your application with: “I can handle a full rebrand.”

Include 3 specific branding projects you have worked on

Tell us which project best shows your ability to build a complete brand system

Tell us what design software you use most often

Confirm whether you have experience creating vehicle wrap files and print-ready production files



Please Do Not Apply If:

You only create basic logos

You mainly do social media graphics only

You do not have experience with full branding systems

You cannot deliver polished, production-ready files

You do not have a portfolio showing relevant work



Application Note:

Applications that do not follow the instructions above may not be considered.
